title: Devs Simulator
description: Welcome to the world of high technology and business! In this exciting strategy game you will become the director of a thriving IT company. Your task is to find the best programmers, assemble a dream team and lead it to success!

title: Space Pin Master - Pull Pin Puzzle
description: Relax and challenge your brain with Space Pin Master! Enjoy satisfying pull pin puzzles in a space adventure full of gravity-based fun. Free the balls, avoid bombs and obstacles to fill the spaceship. Spin to win coins and unlock new balls, pins, spaceships, and themes. Simple yet addictive gameplay with stunning graphics and innovative levels. Ready to become the pull pin master? Jump in and start the space puzzle adventure!

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Survival in Area 51
description: You will play as the character Stas, who works in Area 51. One day, Stas was given a strange task, to find acid and pour it into an unusual device. Then something terrible happened... In Area 51, an explosion occurred underground, and zombies appeared. They began to attack scientists and guards. Your task is to destroy zombies, mercenaries and find a way out of this terrible underground place. The game offers shooting, simple puzzles, a plot, many locations and a final battle.

title: Goo Goo Gaga Clicker
description: Goo Goo Gaga Clicker is a fast, satisfying idle clicker built around one of the internet’s newest chaotic obsessions: the “Goo Goo Gaga” meme. Goo Goo Gaga Clicker takes the addictive, dopamine-fueled mechanics of Brainrot Clicker and gives them a surreal makeover.  What starts as a simple tap session quickly turns into a full-on collection grind where every click pushes you closer to the next weird, iconic form!

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Coin Blitz
description: Fast-paced coin shooting action! Destroy waves of enemies, collect tons of coins, and grow stronger as you play. Drag and position your shooter strategically while watching satisfying coin explosions and smooth gameplay. Simple to start, hard to master — how long can you survive?

title: Gummy merge
description: Jelly merge is an endless game in which to merge identical marmalades. The goal of the game is to reach the final marmalade.

title: Single Stroke: Energy Line Puzzle
description: Single Stroke: Energy Line Puzzle is a fun and simple way to train your brain every day. This mind-challenging game has easy rules—just connect all the circles using a single continuous line. It’s a great way to keep your brain sharp with quick, clever puzzles. Spend just a few minutes daily to give your mind a boost. Enjoy this brain-training experience anytime, anywhere!

title: Slingshot Master
description: Take aim with a powerful slingshot, launch your hero through the air, and eliminate stickman foes in exciting, dynamic levels. With easy-to-learn controls, you’ll quickly master the art of launching, facing new challenges and enemies with every level.

title: Snake Puzzle Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced puzzle experience where your goal is to wiggle the snake through each grid while avoiding obstacles and other snakes. With simple controls and a variety of challenging levels, this is the perfect game for quick play during your free time.

title: Idle Bathroom Empire Tycoon
description: Ready to become the ultimate bathroom tycoon? In this exciting mix of simulation, management, and idle tycoon gameplay, you’ll start with a small restroom. Grow it into a luxurious five-star hygiene haven! Upgrade facilities, optimize services, and expand your empire to make your bathroom the most popular spot in town. Manage your front desk with care, and faster cashiering will give you more cash flow.

title: Rocket Fest
description: Control the rocket to collect energy or other useful props along the way, and bomb the target at the end! This is a casual stress relief game.

title: Idle Landmark Builder
description: Enjoy a casual idle simulation management game in the Idle Landmark - Builder. Here, you'll play the role of a construction tycoon and build world-famous landmarks from scratch. Manage workers to increase speed or your income, hire more workers and build your own construction empire. Build world-famous landmarks such as the Eiffel Tower and the Pyramids, and witness the entire process of their construction.

title: Food Truck Chef Cooking
description: Welcome to Food Truck Chef Cooking, a casual food cooking simulation game online. Want to experience a day of a food truck chef? Are you curious about what the screw's work is like on an airplane? Join our best chef simulator game and resolve all your doubts. Step into the kitchen of a running truck and answer all your customers' requests. Challenge your mind and boost your thinking in this cooking management game.

title: Office Brawl - Room Smash
description:
Become the hero of an office rebellion and destroy everything in your path! The player will have to transform into a disgruntled employee who challenges the system, destroys obstacles and fights the boss.

Use brute force and ingenuity to get through difficult tests, participate in intense battles and explosive actions.
Become an antihero and sow chaos from start to finish!

title: Match Dream Garden
description: What a beautiful garden! Match leaves, flowers, apples and other items to progress. Use power-ups like the Hammer to remove any piece, the Rake to clear an entire row or column, or the Gardening Gloves to swap two pieces.

title: Find It Out Colorful Book
description: Begin a challenging yet relaxing casual game in Find It Out Colorful Book. It brings you into a colorful world. You will begin an adventure to find hidden objects. Choose your favorite mode like beach, city, zoo, etc. Each page is filled with color and mysterious numbers waiting to be discovered and unlocked.

title: Fusion 2048
description: Fusion 2048 is an addictive puzzle game where you combine matching numbered blocks to reach higher values and aim for the elusive 2048 block. Play in Classic or Shape Mode, plan your moves to avoid filling the container, and use TNT blocks to clear space. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and score tracking, it’s perfect for quick sessions or long strategic runs—easy to pick up, hard to master.

title: Block Sniper
description:
Pixelated sniper action game where you have to complete various missions in a blocky world. 
Game where you are a sniper who performs various missions in a block-based world.

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Klondike Solitaire
description:
Test your skill and logic with Klondike, the classic solitaire game loved by generations!

Stack the cards in ascending order, alternating colors, and complete all four suits to win the game.

With clean graphics, intuitive controls, and the option to play with one or three cards, Klondike offers hours of fun and relaxation.

Perfect for a quick break or a long strategic challenge!

title: Room Sort Floor Plan
description: Room Sort Floor Plan is a fun creative puzzle game with elements of sorting and design. In this casual game, you’ll go through proper sorting and organization. Designing the perfect layout for every room. Rearrange the floor plan to create your unique home. Each level is a jigsaw puzzle challenge.

title: Fashion Famous
description: Step into the stylish universe of Fashion Famous! Compete in glamorous fashion contests, pick outfits that match each round’s theme, and impress the judges to earn high scores. Travel across global fashion capitals and showcase your look on dazzling runways. Explore makeup, hairstyles, and accessories to build the perfect outfit. Will your sense of style stand out among players from all around the world?

title: Dynamons 11
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 11! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Guardian Island world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons connoisseur Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon Captain. Encounter Chyroax, Scorvenox, Axolotix, Uryndur, Skyvioru, Golunaryx and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Pixel Destroyer
description:
Pixel Destroyer is an exciting physics-based arcade puzzle game where your goal is to destroy colorful pixel shapes using bouncing balls.

Dive into a world of pixel destruction! In this game, you’ll need to use your wits and precision. Each level features a unique shape made of pixel blocks. Your objective is to destroy them all using a limited number of shots. The balls follow the laws of physics, bouncing off walls and obstacles, allowing you to reach even the most hard-to-access blocks.

title: Mojo Emoji
description: Moji Emoji is a fun and clever word/emoji puzzle game where each level challenges you to guess the hidden word or phrase from a set of expressive emojis. Think fast, connect the clues, and test your emoji decoding skills across hundreds of creative puzzles.

title: Dog Merge Mania
description: Merge cute puppies! Unlock breeds & grow your own fluffy dog paradise! A Relaxing Escape: The perfect mix of chill gameplay and light strategy.

title: ASMR Tattoo Treatment
description: Treat a cool rocker in your ASMR clinic! Heal their sore piercing with gentle tools, retouch their fading star tattoo, and enjoy relaxing sounds with every step. Make them smile with your careful care and earn rewards for a perfect treatment!

title: Hexa Stack Christmas
description: Get into the holiday spirit with Hexa Stack Christmas: a festive twist on the classic hexagon-stacking puzzle game. Place the Christmas-themed hexagon tiles stacks onto the board and sort the same color tiles to collect them. The game combines a light puzzle that requires attention and logic — perfect for relaxing while stimulating your brain. 2 game modes, infinite levels, a user-friendly interface, and save support let you play anytime without losing progress.

title: Dots Master
description:
Dots Master is a fun and strategic puzzle game where you connect matching dots to solve colorful challenges. Connect dots vertically or horizontally, and form squares to clear all dots of the same color in a single move!

Each level has a special goal — clear a certain number of colored dots, pop stars, make loops, or conquer the tiles — all within a limited number of moves. With 5 exciting chapters packed with creative puzzles.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers. Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: Doodle Dino Run
description: Doodle Dino Run delivers an addictive running adventure where you control a cute dinosaur, avoid dangers, and push your distance record farther every time you play. Featuring smooth side-scrolling gameplay, precise jump timing is essential to survive. Packed with action, this dinosaur adventure challenges your reflexes as the speed continuously increases.

title: Hill Racing - Egg drop!
description:
Press down to accelerate your car. Go as fast as you can carrying an egg while collection coins. 

Upgrade your cars and levels with coins.

title: Fashion Challenge: Catwalk Run
description: Fashion Challenge: Catwalk Run is a stylish dress-up game where you join glamorous catwalk competitions. Pick the perfect outfit, match accessories, style your hair, and impress the judges. Travel to fashion shows around the world, earn points, unlock outfits, and become a global trendsetter. Win challenges to climb the leaderboard and prove your fashion sense. Every level brings a new style theme to conquer!

title: Miner's Fury!
description:
Miner's Fury! Avoid and destroy!

Clear and destroy rock waves. Lookout for mystery rocks too! Buy and deploy Turrets to breeze through levels. 
Collect the coins that drop from the destroyed rocks, and spend them buying Turrets, and to Upgrade yourself. Upgrades will make you deal more damage faster, earn more coins, as well as improving your spawned Turrets.
Lookout for Missions to earn rewards!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Combine Pickaxes
description:
Start with simple tools and upgrade them to powerful devices that can destroy any obstacles! Buy, combine and power up tools to earn more money for destroying rocks, trees and other objects.**
Goal: become a master of destruction, collect a powerful arsenal and conquer all levels. Think over your strategy, upgrade your tools and prove that you can handle any obstacles!

title: Stickman Guys Defense
description:
Stickman Guys Defense is an action-packed tower defense game where you must protect your base from endless waves of enemies! Command a team of brave stickman warriors, place them strategically, and upgrade their abilities to stop the invasion. From archers to sword fighters, build the ultimate defense and survive each level!

Can you defend your land and become the ultimate Stickman commander?

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: Bid Wars 1: Auction Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of becoming a smart and fearless auction tycoon? Bid Wars 1: Auction Simulator is an addictive auction and simulation game that puts you in exciting bidding wars to uncover hidden treasures! In this game, you join intense auctions for storage units, antiques, and mysterious items. Spot valuable gems, bid wisely, and sell them for huge profits! From small street auctions to luxury halls, build your empire step by step!

title: Tile Adventure
description: A fun and satisfying tile-matching puzzle game! Match tiles in sets of three, clear the board, and enjoy a relaxing, brain-teasing experience. With smooth gameplay, colorful visuals, and levels that gradually increase in challenge, it’s perfect for anyone who loves casual puzzles. (Inspired by the classic Mahjong layout, but with a fresh, modern twist!)

title: Ole Bunny
description: Ole Bunny plunges you into a crazy arena where a cute bunny finds himself because of his love for roses ! Now you must show courage and skill to escape the wild bulls and collect as many fragrant roses as possible. Can you become the best bunny matador of all time?

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Brainrots Lava Survive Online
description: Brainrots Lava Survive Online is an intense survival experience where rising lava transforms the map into a dangerous obstacle zone. Players must collect brainrots in risky areas and escape before the lava blocks safe routes. Online mode is available in 1 Player, allowing chat and interaction, while 2 Player mode offers local shared-screen competition. With more than 60 characters in normal, gold, diamond, Celestial, and time-limited Divine tiers, progression stays dynamic.

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: Float for Brainrots
description: Float for Brainrots is a chaotic water adventure game where you collect rare Brainrots across dangerous seas. Start with a simple raft, unlock powerful boats, upgrade speed and capacity, and explore deeper waters for better rewards. Manage your timer, avoid sharks, and use islands to survive. Play solo or with a friend in 2 player mode and build your ultimate Brainrot collection.

title: Gluttony
description: In Gluttony, you control a giant hole with endless appetite! Move around, swallow everything, and grow like in snake games or Hole.io. But watch out—you’re allergic to cute monsters, so dodge them to survive! Perfect for fans of .io games, eat games, and cool math games students love at school. With fun challenges, addictive arcade action, and silly gameplay, Gluttony is the ultimate free kids game to play anytime.

title: Horror Playtime Room Escape
description: Challenge your brain to break through the fog of horror. In Horror Playtime - Room Escape you will enter a mysterious story. You spend your birthday with Ye Chen on the roof of a building. The strange woman suddenly appeared and trapped you in a horrible room. Enter many rooms full of puzzles and horror! Use your brain to solve hidden things and uncover the truth of horror stories. Every detail in the room is full of mystery.

title: Cake Sorting Deluxe
description: Cake Sorting Deluxe is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your sorting skills! Shift cakes across shelves to make matches of three or more. Clear the board, uncover hidden and shadowed cakes, and solve tricky puzzles as you go. With cute visuals, smooth gameplay, and lots of sweet challenges, Cake Sorting Deluxe is a treat for anyone who loves a good puzzle. Ready to mix, match, and clear the shelves?

title: Ship & Fish
description: Ship & Fish is an exciting survival game where the player controls a ship and tries to stay alive by avoiding dangerous fish. The game requires fast reflexes and smart movement, as fish attack from all directions. The longer you survive, the higher your score grows and the more challenging the game becomes.

title: Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
description:
Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
Swipe fruits, blast combos & solve hundreds of juicy match-3 puzzles! Fun for all ages with vibrant graphics, daily rewards, offline play & no time limits. ?? Perfect for quick play or long sessions. Match, crush & enjoy!

Play now and test your brain!

title: Labubu Adventure
description:
Dive into a world of Labubu characters. If you are looking for an amazing adventure, help the little Labubu to complete all the levels and collect coins through the fantasy world.
Whether you want to elevate your gaming skills or just look for simple fun, you can always find something that fits your type.

title: Catch The Goose
description: Catch The Goose is a puzzle elimination mini-game. Players can tap identical items to automatically send them to the bottom slot - when three matching items gather, they get eliminated. When players successfully clear all items arranged in the grid, they get to "catch" a mischievous goose. Its addictive simplicity, stress-relieving design, and playful art style have made it a cultural phenomenon.

title: Blox Fruits
description: Embark on an epic adventure across the seas in Blox Fruits, a Roblox MMORPG inspired by the world of One Piece. Choose your path as a Pirate or Marine, master powerful abilities granted by mystical Blox Fruits, and strive to become the strongest player in the game

title: Madness Driver Vertigo City
description: Mad drivers meet in the vertigo city with their cool super sport racing cars. The city offers a plethora of exciting activities and races. Fly through the ramps and collect gems to double your fun. Enjoy amusement park activities and play single or 2 player mode to challenge your friend in races or free drive activities. Begin the supercar simulator and customize your cars with unique designs.

title: Backrooms Skibidi terrors
description:
Backrooms Skibidi Toilet Terrors is an action terror game, run and grab the coin.
Avoid skibidi toilet and try to escape! only few people can survive

title: BFFs Y2K Fashion
description: Welcome to BFFs Y2K Fashion, the exciting new fashion designer game that lets you explore the trend of the year 2000! With a wide selection of styles from the decade, you can create the perfect look and express your fashion sense. From skater girl skirts to ripped jeans and t-shirts, or even the classic Y2K look with fun-colored low-waisted jeans and crop tops, you can customize your outfit and become an ultimate fashion designer. Play now and let your style shine!

title: Snap Fix
description:
Snap Fix is a fast-paced block puzzle game where you slide tiles to restore a scrambled picture.
With one empty space to maneuver, you must think quickly and arrange the grid before time runs out!
Complete the puzzle to unlock and download the image as a reward.
Can you snap everything into place before the clock hits zero?

title: Avatar Master - Fix Up Face
description: Creative and unique puzzle. Fix your avatar's face. Collect all the puzzles of beautiful characters. Avatars from anime to Vikings from cute girls to tough knights. Have a fun and train your brain, memory and logic. Meditative and relaxing game play.

title: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll
description:
Ready to destroy and earn? In this sandbox clicker, it's simple: choose your weapon, attack characters, and get paid for the damage you deal. The stronger your attacks, the bigger the reward!  

Use different tactics, unlock new gear, and upgrade your firepower. The further you go, the more powerful the weapons and the greater the possibilities. Ready to become the strongest fighter? Then tap, destroy, and earn!

title: Dalgona Master
description:
Welcome to Dalgona Master, a thrilling game for those who loves dalgona, honeycomb, cookie game, and dalgona challenges.

This engaging sweet game challenge invites you to carve delicate shapes out of honeycomb candy, immersing you in the delicate skill required to perfect each piece without breaking it.

title: God's Mixer
description: Gods Mixer is a fun and experimental game where you combine different heads, bodies, and weapons to create unique characters. After assembling them, you can pit them against each other in battles to see which creation reigns supreme. The game encourages creativity through mixing and matching parts for unexpected results.

title: Unscrew Wood Puzzle
description: Unscrew Wood Puzzle: Screw Jam is an engaging puzzle game that combines logic, strategy, and dexterity in a tactile experience. Players are challenged to solve intricate puzzles involving bolts, nuts, and screws. With hundreds of unique levels, this game provides a blend of relaxation and mental stimulation, perfect for casual gamers and puzzle enthusiasts alike. The beautifully designed wooden and metallic elements create a visually appealing and satisfying gameplay experience.

title: Boyfriend For Hire
description: Pushed by her mom to start dating, studious Amy hires charming transfer student Javier to pose as her boyfriend. Rival Christie, jealous rumors, and a flirty study partner turn the act into real complications. Choose outfits, make tough choices, and decide if this love is real—or just for show.

title: Paint Master
description: Fill the squares to match the sample pattern. Tap the brush to paint a straight line of squares in one move. When your moves reach zero the game is over, so use them carefully to clear the stage!

title: Donne's Spinning World
description:
In this 2D puzzle-platformer, you can spin the entire world using magical leaves. Rotating the world changes gravity and helps you reach new paths.

The goal is to collect all the flowers in each level.
Along the way, you'll need to push boxes, open doors, and avoid spikes and silly monsters.

Jump, rotate, and solve puzzles in a colorful world full of fun challenges!

title: Tralala La La La italiano
description: Immerse yourself in an exciting adventure! In this game you will have to connect Italian animals. Collect a collection of rare animals, discover new species and create your own virtual zoo!

title: City Bike Racing Champion
description: Let's ride some bikes in the Champions City with cool bikes against other riders or with your friend in the 2-player game mode in the City Bike Racing Champion game! Lots of bikes, bags, helmets, costumes, and many other customization options await you. Play either single or 2-player and have some fun in Champions City. Participate in races or ride on the huge free map and do some stunts. Let's ride!

title: Battle Of Tank Steel
description: Are you ready to enter the world of tank battles? In Battle of Tank Steel, you’ll drive powerful tanks into intense battles. Experience endless action and shooting fun! This game puts you on a battlefield filled with challenges and strategy. You can unblock various types of tanks, each with unique capabilities and weapons.

title: Luxury Highway Cars
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning luxury cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Hit Knock Down
description: Hit & Knock Down is a fun casual game where you aim to throw baseballs. Shoot as many targets as possible. Test your precision, reaction speed, and throwing skills. You aim to hit the right targets in each level. The goals at the level are very varied, such as wood, stone, etc. Each level presents different targets. You should hit with a baseball.

title: FlowBall
description: Feel the adrenaline in an exciting 3D arcade game where you control a glowing ball racing through an endless tunnel! Avoid traps, chasms and obstacles, defying the laws of gravity. Your goal is to collect glowing dots to unlock new levels and set records! But be careful: falling into the abyss takes away lives, and losing them leads to defeat!

title: Froggy Hop
description: Froggy Hop is a fun, physics-based game where you launch a bouncy frog and help it travel across lily pads, turtles, and spring pads while dodging obstacles. Upgrade jump power, height, and bounce to go farther. Unlock cool skins with upgrades, complete daily missions, and aim for the best distance!

title: Words from Words
description: "Words from Words" is an exciting game, the purpose of which is to create as many different words as possible from the letters given to you. You can create 29 words from the word «example», «maverick» includes 71 words, and "chalkboard" stores as many as 142 words. Can you solve everything?

title: Jigsort Puzzles
description: Jigsort Puzzle is an app that is art puzzle and lets you complete jigsaw puzzle game for free! Various difficulty levels for casual and experiences puzzlers!

title: Super Football Fever
description: We bring you an unprecedentedly realistic soccer experience with smooth motion-captured animations and lifelike 3D graphics that make you feel like you're on a top-tier league field. Build your dream team, sign superstars, and win matches with precise tactical arrangements. Whether it's quick short passes or stunning long-range goals, you can do it all with ease at your fingertips.

title: Pictures Riddle
description:
Guess 1 word based on shown 4 pictures
Discover what word can be related to pictures
Game has 2 modes: “Pictures” & “Riddles”
 
Features:
-     Simple & addictive gameplay
-     Challenging riddles
-     Hundreds of fun levels
-     …



** Credits:
-     Music by “Fred Patry”
-     Menu vector created by upklyak – www.freepik.com

title: Happy Bubbles
description: Boom! Hear that pop? The bubbles are calling! This classic bubble shooter blends quick reflexes with clever strategy. Spin the Lucky Wheel for extra rewards, claim weekly bonus and dive into a bright, cute world that never runs out of fun.

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Cocktailz
description: Thirsty? Make all sorts of cocktails in this refreshing Match-3 game! Excessive alcohol consumption is harmful to health, but you can play this game without moderation.

title: Jungle Fury Mutant Rhino Mayhem
description: Enter a jungle plagued by mutant rhino warriors! As a brave tribal hero, rescue captured villagers, battle fierce enemies, and defeat powerful rhino bosses. Use bows, axes, and legendary weapons from the Blacksmith Shop to fight through deadly swamps, chaotic caverns, and fortified ramparts. Can you stop the Apex Mutant Rhino Warlord and restore peace to the land?

title: Hero Transform Race
description: Hero Transform Race is an action-packed and fun parkour game that transforms you from an ordinary person into a legendary superhero. Your goal is to reach the end of the track by transforming into the appropriate superhero form for the obstacles you encounter!

title: Winter Maze
description:
Step into a frosty puzzle adventure with Winter Maze! Explore icy, snow-covered mazes and guide your ball through slippery, twisty paths that fill up with every move. Each level challenges you to think ahead, plan your route and clear the entire field to unlock the next stage.
Simply swipe to roll the ball in any direction and watch the maze come to life beneath you. Your goal is clear: cover every tile and leave no space untouched.

title: Color Mix - Jelly Merge
description: This is an enthralling puzzle game with jellies. Dive into the world of exciting puzzles! Match jellies of the same color to reach new heights and beat high scores. With each level, the challenges get tougher and the fun gets bigger.

title: Butterfly Match Mastery
description:
Plunge into the atmosphere of a magical forest in a new game in the style of Mahjong Connect. Free the butterflies by finding identical pairs of wings!

Butterfly Match Mastery is an amazing game that will give you moments of pleasure. Free butterflies in an enchanted magical forest by connecting pairs of identical wings and enjoy their flight! But don't forget about the time, when it runs out - you will lose.

title: Banana Bounce!
description:
Banana Bounce! ? is a side-scrolling game where you lead your banana to as far as you can.
Discover many cool ? and amazing ? powerups to boost ? your progress!
Discover unique ? characters and earn coins ? while you run!
Don't forget to upgrade ⬆️ your powerups to make them even stronger ? and better!

Made with ❤️ by Realinspirer

title: Mini Scrapbook Paper
description: Mini Scrapbook Paper is a super cute art game made for girls. Do you have a journal? Have you ever designed your journal with your own style? In this game, you can design a journal freely. With colorful pages, fancy stickers and other cute accessories we prepared for you, you can use your imagination as much as you like. Have a good time!

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Pop Puzzle
description: Dive into the vibrant world of Pop Puzzle, a colorful block-busting challenge that tests your strategy and quick thinking. Tap on groups of matching blocks to clear the screen and progress through levels filled with satisfying chain reactions. Simple, addictive, and fun for players of all ages.

title: Hex Triple Match
description: Hex Triple Match brings together puzzle challenges, strategic matching and merging experiences. This game consists of clever puzzle-solving and logical manoeuvres, making it ideal for those seeking a brain workout.  You need to consider how to place them to eliminate them faster. Each colour represents an item, giving you a great gaming experience. Beautiful graphics bring you visual enjoyment. Come and join the merging game world.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d
description: Roll your block across challenging 3D platforms and drop it into the goal hole to solve each puzzle. Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d is an addictive block puzzle game that tests your logic, spatial thinking, and problem-solving skills across dozens of mind-bending levels.

title: Pin Detective
description:
Welcome to Pin Detective - Mystery Mansion!
A rich woman mysteriously vanished in a lavish mansion that was covered by the rumors of ghosts and dangerous monsters. A talented detective is committed to uncovering the mystery.
By pulling the pin, you can collect clues that enlighten the truth. What happens to the billionaire? Why do the biological laboratory and so many alien animals exist in this mansion? Let’s use your brain to solve the puzzle to find it out.

title: Going Balls Adventure 2
description: Going Balls Adventure 2 is a ball-rolling arcade game with a 3D game engine. Your main mission is to collect black balls and reach the checkpoint. Your side mission is to collect all coins on the platform. It doesn't matter if you don't fish the job. Before the level begins, you have a chance to try some free skins for you to decide on a favorite one.

title: Dop Puzzle Erase Master
description:
It is an interesting online game that will take you to an unparalleled puzzle-solving  experience. To solve the puzzles, you may use your imagination and ingenuity. You need to consider what do I erase to pass the level. Within the challenging levels, you  need to use strategic thinking to conquer each puzzle. In each level, you must make use of the
  eraser to erase a part of the picture to show a hidden object or scene. The deletion puzzles are  easy to learn, but challenging to master.

title: Dino Game
description: Play Dino Game online! An offline-style dinosaur run for 1–3 players. Jump cacti, dodge flyers, unlock dinos, and race for high scores. Dino Game brings the classic offline dinosaur run to life with fast, responsive gameplay and local multiplayer. Dash across an endless desert, jump over cacti, and duck under swooping dinos as the speed steadily climbs. Play solo to beat your personal best, or switch to 2-player and 3-player modes to race friends on the same device.

description: "Cartoon Moto Stunt is a gripping racing and customization game with 24 thrilling levels! Choose from 4 unique motorcycles, each with 4 eye-catching designs. Use coins earned to buy and upgrade bikes. Each level presents new challenges, requiring lightning-fast reflexes and precise timing. With vibrant cartoon graphics and addictive gameplay, it's perfect for adrenaline junkies and racing enthusiasts. Prepare for daring stunts and race to victory!"

title: PopSortica
description:
PopSortica is a new chapter in Poppy’s adventures! Join the underwater SORTING voyage! Challenging yet relaxing levels await as you sort things out.
The rules are simple, but the difficulty increases with each new level.
Special obstacles and conditions will challenge your skills, while boosters will help you achieve the best results faster.
Dive deep with Mermaid Poppy and challenge yourself in this exciting sea sorting adventure!

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look
description: Welcome to the My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look game. Cottagecore fashion is inspired by farm life, it is very impractical for doing chores around the farm! Princess Elsa, Anna, and Ariel are best friends planning to try something special. Get ready to explore the Cottagecore fashion style along with them to create the cutest looks!

title: Stick Rope Hero
description: Are you ready to become a super stickman hero? In Stick Rope Hero, you enter an exciting sandbox world filled with adventures and challenges. Swing around the open city with your powerful rope skills and completing many action tasks.

title: Tiles Matching
description:
Free online game Tiles Matching - play in the browser without downloading. It is suitable for the development of logic for both adults and children - an ideal timekiller.
Tiles Matching is a puzzle game combining the game mechanics of Mahjong and Three in a Row (Match-3). A logical educational game for children and adults. With each level, the difficulty increases - not everyone can complete the game the first time. Challenge your intelligence.

title: Domino Adventure
description: Discover three match durations to suit your style. Showcase your skills and logic in each round, and use strategic moves to outplay your opponents. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts seeking endless fun and challenges.

title: Detective - Logic Puzzles
description:
Become a Detective! Solve logic puzzles to find the criminal! 
Lots of levels and interesting stories!

You will have to solve a lot of different cases, in this you will be helped by the method of deduction known to all detectives.

title: Extreme Real Car Driving 2025
description: This ultimate car racing 3D lets you experience real car driving simulator like highway racing with its realistic car damage, accurate car driving physics and many other features. Car driver may use steering wheel, accelerator meter or buttons to control the car. Enjoy the best car driving simulator game and drag racing game that has an addictive game play with endless fun. Now you can modify your any sports race cars from garage according to your interest.

title: Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes
description:
Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes is an exciting game in which the player has to become a real wrecking racer.

There are many unique cars available in the game, each of which has its own characteristics and capabilities. From classic sports cars to massive monster trucks, you will have complete freedom to choose the vehicle for your crazy adventures.

title: Counter Craft Sniper
description: Counter Craft Sniper is a first-person shooter where you step into the boots of an elite sniper sent to protect a city invaded by Minecraft mobs. Creepers, skeletons, and zombies have appeared in the middle of downtown, and only your precision and quick reflexes can stop them before the chaos spreads. Armed with your trusty sniper rifle, you must take position on rooftops and high vantage points to eliminate every hostile target that threatens the civilians below.

title: Supermarket Sort N Match
description: In 'Supermarket Sort n Match,' rearrange items between shelves to match 3 identical items on one shelf, clearing it and allowing upper shelves to slide down. Clear entire stacks to shift adjacent shelves. Collect all items before time runs out as difficulty increases with each level. Enjoy the ultimate item-sorting and matching challenge!

title: Agent Zero: Infiltration
description: Step into Agent Zero: Infiltration, the ultimate spy game packed with stealth action and secret missions. Sneak past guards, hack security, and escape dangerous traps while completing thrilling puzzles. Perfect for fans searching “stealth game,” “spy puzzle,” or “escape game,” this free adventure tests your skills and strategy. Outsmart enemies, unlock levels, and prove you’re the top undercover agent in this addictive mission challenge!

title: 3D FPS Target Shooting
description:
3D FPS Target Shooting is an addictive 3D FPS game. The logic of the game is very simple, use your weapon to aim and shoot various targets to get higher scores. Simple and unique gun control experience, aiming and shooting at the targets can be done easily with one hand.Kar98k, M24, and AWM are amazing weapons you can unlock them using the coins you get from passing the levels. The game is
completely free and you can play it online on any device!

title: Marble Blast
description: Ready to match, blast, and conquer? This vibrant marble shooter game offers endless fun and challenges that test your skills and strategy. Clear colorful marbles, unlock powerful boosters, and prove you’re the master of marble puzzles! Whether you’re a casual gamer or a puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers excitement like no other.

title: Italian Brainrot Jigsaw
description: Italian Brainrot Jigsaw is a funny puzzle game with the most popular meme characters. You can select one of the fifteen images and then select one of the four modes (16, 36, 64 and 100 pieces). Select your favorite picture and complete the jigsaw in the shortest time possible! title: Shipbuilding tycoon
description:
Do you want to become a shipyard manager and build big ships?
Step into the role of a shipyard manager and grow your very own ship empire in this addictive idle game! As you build ships, earn profits, and unlock epic vessels, you’ll expand your factory and boost production efficiency.

description: Shooting game about a quarantined city due to the threat of infection with a zombie virus. The main gameplay will revolve around the fact that you will need to survive in this difficult, riddled city.

Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Stack n Sort
description:
Welcome to Stack n Sort, the ultimate color stack game that combines precision, hoop sort strategy, and excitement in one addictive experience.

Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant stack color and dynamic hoop sort challenges as you test your skills and aim for high scores. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a competitive enthusiast, hoop stack offers endless fun and engagement.

title: Zombie Redemption
description: Zombie Redemption is an action-survival game set in a world where a failed experiment has turned most of humanity into zombies. Players earn gold by defeating zombies, which can be used to unlock stronger weapons. However, zombies also attack, making quick reflexes and strategic thinking essential for survival. Combining elements of strategy, action, and survival, this game offers an unforgettable adventure in the fight to save the world.

title: Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up
description: Dress up your paper doll with mystical styles in Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up! ?✨ Get ready to enter a dreamy world where fantasy meets fashion. Whether you're a fashion dreamer, a lover of magic, or a diary keeper at heart, this enchanted adventure is made just for you.

title: Zombie Frontier Shooter
description: Zombie Frontier Shooter is filled with non-stop action and zombie-slaying madness! However, survivors must rise up and engage in a life-or-death struggle against the zombie menace, morphing into fearless zombie shooters who will stop at nothing to secure their territory.

title: ChessField
description: Enter ChessField, a strategic battle chess game where classic moves meet action-packed arenas! Plan, fight, and outsmart rivals in epic chess battles across dynamic fields. With addictive gameplay, smart tactics, and arcade-style twists, ChessField is the ultimate free kids game for fans of chess, battle chess, and strategy games.

Explore the levels in Story Mode, or challenge your friends in Duel Mode for two-player fun. Easy to play, fun to master! Are you ready to rule the sea?

Protect your home from endless waves of zombies!
Defeat zombies to collect coins and ability drops.
Use coins to upgrade both your player and your house.
Each level makes the zombies stronger.
How long can you survive?

title: Racing Car Destroying Zombie
description:
Zombie Racing Car fast-paced physics-based racing game. You’re in for the ride of your life through a zombie apocalypse!

Drive your car through deserts, forests, abandoned city,...surrounded by zombies, earn cash, upgrade your car powerful ones. Steer your car to keep balance on the hills while trying to smash zombies into debris. It's you against a boatload of super-strong zombies!

title: Twisted Rope
description: Get ready for a mind-bending challenge! ? Twisted Rope Puzzle 3D is a captivating game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. Dive into a colorful world of tangled ropes and work your way through increasingly complex puzzles.

Open all the criminal's doors and escape from the desert island!
You will have to go through two interesting escape stories.
The first story is about how the criminal kidnapped the character Stick and locked him in the rooms.
The second story is about how the character Stick ended up on an island in the ocean.
Go through all the stories, fight for your life! Break open doors, use various objects. Guess all the puzzles and versions of fate.

description:
In Brooms Town, you must solve four amazing adventures:

Problems with the pipes:

    • Block the water leaks as soon as possible.

    • Help Roy with the hoses.
    • Make Bruner as clean as a whistle.

title: Run N Shoot

In levels you find difficult, you can get hints or skip the level directly. You can play Save My Pet Party game in 1 Player or 2 Player modes.

The game ends when you run out of moves.

Play card games, relax and train your memory and brain with CityMix Solitaire. Solitaire CityMix is more than just another game♠♥♠♥!

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Pin Puzzle Love Story
description: Are you ready to use your logical mind to save love? In Pin Puzzle-Love Story, you face a series of interesting and challenging levels. Pull pins in the right order to solve puzzles and help couples reunite. Each level is a new Logic puzzle that can only be successfully completed by pulling the right latch!

title: Mr Long Hand
description: Immerse yourself in the quirky and delightful world of Mr Long Hand, where you take on the role of a stickman with incredibly long arms. Your mission is simple yet endlessly entertaining: use your elongated limbs to swing through obstacles, solve puzzles, and embark on thrilling rescues. Mr Long Hand offers a unique blend of creativity, challenge, and humor that is sure to captivate players of all ages.

title: Taxi Simulator 2024
description:
Are you prepared to play an awesome simulator? Taxi Simulator 2024 is an online game set in an open environment with objectives to help you improve your cab driving abilities. Pick up the passengers and drive them to their destination, following the directions and exploring all of the maps to locate the streets and addresses.

This game includes many game modes to keep you entertained; accomplish the stages in taxi or open mode, and freely explore the whole landscape.

title: Tile Match Cafe
description:
Discover the engaging tile-matching puzzle game that plunges you into a world of triple-tile tapping challenges and stimulating fun.

Prepare yourself for an exciting adventure filled with complex puzzles as you match tiles, clear the boards, and strive to become the top tile master.

With its intuitive mechanics and addictive gameplay, Tile Match Cafe is an ideal pick for fans of tile-matching games seeking a charming and rewarding puzzle experience.

? Download now and start solving today!

Confront challenges with diverse boosters to overcome obstacles and achieve higher scores.

title: Magic Princess Dress Up Doll

Funnel: Push cars into the abyss as the funnel narrows!
Rotating Cube: Stay on the spinning cube, which speeds up over time!

Choose from foreign or Russian cars and dive into the action!

Each region can have only one king, and kings cannot be in the same row or column. They also cannot be next to each other, meaning the nearest tiles must be empty. To win the level, you must place all kings correctly. Placing a king in the wrong spot reduces your points.

In this exciting arcade challenge, collect characters of the same color to grow your team. Merge them for a bigger squad, aiming for the highest score. Avoid hammers, spikes, etc. Collect characters of the same color to expand your team.

Some levels include traps like electric cables and spinning gears that can be activated with arrows. In 2 Player Mode, players choose from 7 arrows and compete to hit their opponent the most.

title: Halloween Challenge

Tap the bats before they escape with the sweet treats. But beware, if even one bat escapes, the game is over! With simple controls and addictive gameplay, Halloween Challenge offers a fun and fast-paced experience for players. Test your reflexes, compete for high scores, and enjoy the eerie Halloween atmosphere. How long can you defend the candy?

Tap normal and gold balloons to score, but avoid the tricky skull balloons!
With vibrant visuals, increasing difficulty, and simple controls, it's perfect for quick, casual play on any device.

title: Paint Rush
description: White houses are boring. Bring the colors in and paint everything in seconds. Complete every level painting all white spaces. Swipe left, right, up and down and fill all the empty spots on Paint Rush

title: Put the fruit together!
description: A game in the genre of "Connect the Balls" and "2048". Stack identical fruits to combine them into a new larger fruit! The game has incredibly beautiful and cute graphics, nice music accompaniment and addictive gameplay!

title: Drive-in Cinema: Idle Game
description: Drive-in Cinema: Idle Game lets you build your perfect movie theater and run a profitable business. Choose the best films to satisfy guests and increase income. Expand parking, open snack kiosks, automate processes, and hire employees to optimize operations. Complete over 50 missions, enjoy colorful 3D graphics, and immerse yourself in a unique atmosphere. Buy movies, prepare snacks, and grow your theater to attract more viewers. Ready to become the top drive-in owner?

title: Bubble Ball
description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts.

title: Horde Hunters
description: Horde Hunters is an idle and clicker game where you will earn money by killing zombies. Upgrade to a new level by merging soldiers, speeding up your shots, and increasing the amount of money you get. Shoot a horde of zombies from the top of a moving vehicle and get rich!

title: Crusher Clicker
description: Crusher Clicker is an addictive game where you smash rocks and crystals, then upgrade to enhance your crushing power and speed. It's like operating a hydraulic press but with a satisfying, stress-relieving twist.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Save Her Tour
description: This complex and relaxing puzzle game you've read about has finally become a reality! Only the smartest can pass these brain teaser quizzes and save the girl! Each level will give you a scenario where you must use your ingenuity to solve the problem. If you mess up, it won't end well for our heroine. There are so many different challenges waiting to be solved. This is the best puzzle game ever! Solve interesting puzzles, protect the girl from harm, and experience the thrill of success.

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Bloom Within: A life simulator
description:
The simulator of a pregnant mother allows you to fully experience the whole process of pregnancy.
In this anime game you have to play the role of a girl who has a loving husband and a child under her heart, who is waiting for her birth. Take care of yourself, give birth, take care of your baby and raise a healthy baby.

title: Word Art – Color Book Puzzle
description: Discover a delightful gaming experience that combines the thrill of solving word puzzles with the joy of bringing art to life. In Word Art – Color Book Puzzle, you’ll embark on a creative journey where words are the key to unlocking vibrant colors and stunning illustrations.

title: Majestic Dragons Merge
description:
In the days of old, dragons wander the lands as the master of all. Breathe fire and plunder all the riches in Majestic Dragons!

Majestic Dragons is an idle merge game where you merge together similar objects to obtain new things. Help your baby dragons grow into fearsome, majestic beasts! Watch them roam freely across the lands and accumulate riches for you.

Do you know how to train a dragon? Come play now and let's find out!

title: 100 Doors Puzzle Box
description: The main goal in 100 Doors Puzzle Box is to escape the room. Using all the possibilities you need to open each of 100 doors and move the elevator to the next floor. Search for hidden objects, sovle puzzles and use an items to do this!

title: Cannon Merge
description: Beat off waves of snow monsters, connect cannons to get more and more improved cannon models. Monsters are strong and there are a lot of them, they constantly attack. Upgrade the base and guns, defeat them all!

title: Legend of Dragon Hunt
description:
Legend Of Dragon Hunt is a clicker game. Players control a skeleton hero to eliminate invading monsters, gain resources/skills, and defeat bosses.
Features: light-hearted 2D cartoon style, joystick control, auto-shooting.
Systems: Pet, Player Upgrade, Sign-in, Weapon, Weapon Fusion, Idle.

title: Kawaii Realm Adventure
description: Embark on a whimsical journey to the "Kawaii Realm" with Sarah, Emma, Lily, and Mia! Discover a hidden portal in their school basement, transforming them into adorable 2D characters. Engage in dress-up and makeup activities for a delightful adventure!

title: Dynamons 10
description: Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 10! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Gold Temple world and the bonus cave. Encounter Tyrexar, Tyceratox, Cobragora, Pterodanox, Knightanyx and the diamond Guardian and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Teacher Simulator
description: Teacher Simulator is a fun simulation game in which you play the role of a teacher. Mark exams and ensure the kids are on their best behavior. You may have been the student, but now you get to be the one in charge!

title: Princess Royal Wedding
description: Welcome to the princess Royal Wedding game. Princesses are getting ready for their wedding with Kristoff and Jack. They waiting so long for this occassion. They need some hand to get ready. Come and join the girls! And make this occassion most beautiful one in their life!

title: Mahjong Connect Majong Class
description: Mahjong Connect is a classic elimination-style casual game where players need to find and connect identical mahjong tiles on the board. The game rules are simple yet challenging, suitable for players of all ages.

title: Math Wall Simulator
description: Combine brainpower and action in this math-based Roblox adventure! Solve equations to break through walls, collect coins, and unlock new challenges. Progress through 20 classes of increasing difficulty, from basic arithmetic to extreme math puzzles

title: Lava Jump
description: Lava Jump is a fast-paced parkour platformer set in a deadly lava-filled dungeon! Jump across moving blocks, bounce off boost pads, and ride shifting platforms to survive. Complete more than 25 levels, evade enemies, spikes and other deadly objects and escape from the lava dungeon alive. Collect coins and get new characters to use in your adventure.

title: Racing Island
description: Explore, race and prove your mastery! Go on an adventurous journey with unique vehicles. Show off your skills in race, freeride and stand modes. Each level is full of new vehicles and discoveries. Are you ready for leadership?

title: Magic Sort
description:
Welcome to Magic Sort! — a relaxing and satisfying color-sorting puzzle with a cute cat café twist!
Your job is to organize colorful water layers inside multiple bottles. Each bottle contains mixed colors, and you must pour them carefully to sort every color correctly. Remember:
You can only pour when the top layers are the same color.
Once a bottle is perfectly sorted and filled with a single color, it magically transforms into a finished drink for your adorable cat customers!

title: Daily Chess Puzzle
description: Enjoy over 700 daily chess puzzles in a sunny, beach-themed world. Lighthearted, relaxing, and perfect for summer fun anytime.

title: Lunar Phase Battle
description: Play Lunar Phase Battle, a simple turn-based strategy game! Connect moon phases to claim tiles and score points. Both players can take each other's tiles by creating pairs or cycles. Each captured tile adds to your score. Dive into celestial strategy and compete to outsmart your opponent!

title: Color Cargo Puzzle Rush
description: Color Cargo Puzzle Rush is the ultimate blend of color puzzle games, and sorting games! Dive into this stress-relieving world of ASMR games where you match delivery boxes with the right cargo buses by their colors. Perfect for fans of color sort puzzle and fun games, this game is all about strategy, speed, and precision.

title: Forest Tiles
description: There are several coins on the 9 by 9 playing field. It is necessary to place the blocks on the playing field in such a way as to completely assemble a vertical or horizontal line. Gold coins can be used to reset unnecessary blocks and continue the game if you lose.

title: Ninja Obby Parkour
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Ninja Obby Parkour, where every level is a test of speed, agility, and strategy. Packed with hundreds of unique obstacle courses, this game combines competitive racing with ninja-style combat and dazzling customization options.

From smashing glass doors at checkpoints with your ninja power to unlocking powerful bonuses like speed boost, giant mode, and flight, every run feels fresh.

title: Pubg Hack
description: Experience the ultimate shooting adventure. In Pubg Hack, you step into the battlefield as an elite soldier, exploring massive maps and engaging in fierce combat. Select a location to land and begin searching for supplies.

title: Space Survivor
description: Jump right into the action, fighting dangerous aliens and executing amazing maneuvers! Sharpen your weapons and skills, you will need them to last as long as possible.

title: Ninja Crossword Challenge
description: It's time to test your vocabulary with Ninja Crossword Challenge, an educational puzzle online game for everyone, and a free game for kids to improve their vocabulary. All you have to do is fill in the words in the grid, the game has more vocabulary than you can imagine, ready to take on my challenge?

title: Kick Loser
description:
Dive into the world of Kick Loser, a puzzle game that challenges your creativity and problem-solving skills. The objective is simple—inflict maximum damage on the stickman hero using a variety of objects. Each object has unique properties, adding a strategic element to your gameplay.
Take aim and deliver powerful drags to send the stickman crashing into objects. Experiment with different angles and forces to achieve the most satisfying results.

title: Hidden objects: Lost Island 2
description: Discover an immersive adventure on a lost island full of secrets, mysteries, and ancient artifacts. Together with a charismatic explorer, you’ll find yourself deep in tropical jungles where a forgotten temple of an ancient civilization lies hidden beneath overgrown vines and trees. Every location is a handcrafted scene packed with hidden objects, puzzles, and clues about the mysterious past.

title: Cheerful Plumber
description: Greetings, young artist. Do you like video games and creativity? Then this game is for you! Color video game characters: a princess, a cheerful plumber, a dragon and others! Choose different colors on the main and secondary palette. Play and color! Take a screenshot and share the result with your friends!

title: My kitties. Catworld
description:
Create your own world with unusual kittens!
At the beginning of the game three kittens are waiting for you, with black, white and ginger colors. 
Create unprecedented colors, mix colors and get new ones: blue, pink, neon-green and others. All this is in our game!
Replenish your collection and perform tasks!

title: 3D Match Puzzle Mania
description: Enter the world of match-3 game brought to life in 3D. Solve captivating puzzles and collect coins to acquire power-ups. Complete daily tasks to earn fantastic bonuses and experience endless fun with every move you make!

title: Mirrors - Puzzle
description: Challenge your mind with Mirrors - Puzzle! In this captivating HTML5 puzzle game, your goal is to connect light dots by reflecting beams of light using mirrors. Strategically place and rotate mirrors to guide the light across the board, linking the dots to complete each level. As you progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring careful planning and problem-solving skills. With its minimalist design and engaging gameplay, Mirrors - Puzzle offers endless brain-teasing fun on any device.

title: Clap Clap Nightmare
description: Clap Clap is a short indie horror game that puts you in the shoes of a house sitter, experiencing strange occurrences in a seemingly ordinary home.

title: Math Lava: Tower Race
description: Test your math skills under pressure in Math Lava: Tower Race, a fast-paced Roblox style web game where quick thinking and accurate answers are your keys to survival. Answer math questions correctly to build blocks beneath you, racing against opponents and rising lava. The faster and more accurate you are, the higher you climb!

title: Hexa Blast Game Puzzle
description:
Hexa Blast Game Puzzle is a fun and challenging game! Try to find the right combination of hexa puzzle. Just drag and drop all the hexa block game on the board. The rule is simple: everything must fit! Enjoy the satisfaction of pieces fitting neatly in place.
Our unique hexagonal pieces will stretch your mind in ways you never imagined in this addictive hexa block puzzle game.
Keep your brain active and sharp, analyze all the possibilities and try to finish all puzzles.

title: Valley of Wolves Ambush
description: Valley Of Wolves Ambush is an action-packed survival game where waves of enemies attack your fortress. Your mission is to protect the fortress without leaving the area. Each wave brings more enemies, making the fight harder. If the enemies capture your fortress or defeat you, the game ends. Earn money by defeating enemies to buy better weapons. The most fun part? You can jump really high! Experience intense battles in a realistic war zone. Can you survive?

title: Quackventure
description: Join Quack, the brave duck, on an exhilarating journey through a magical forest brimming with wonder and hidden secrets. Explore enchanting landscapes, solve intriguing mysteries, and embark on an adventure filled with thrilling surprises and endless excitement at every corner!

title: Ping Pong Air
description: Table tennis, also known as ping pong, is an easy and enjoyable arcade game in which you control the bat as simply as in life: with the mouse or the movement of your finger. Several modes await you to suit every taste. In classic mode, you go through worlds, earn cups and unlock new opportunities. In Halloween mode, you have to banish spirits for a while, improving your reaction. In Career mode, you move up the tournament ladder, taking part in games against increasingly stronger opponents.

title: Two Archers: Bow Duel
description: Get ready for a great battle at the Archery Tournament, because no one is going to just give up and let you win. With each new battle, your enemies will only become stronger. But you shouldn't stay put either. Buy new equipment. A huge selection of different bows will help you defeat your enemies, from simple wooden ones to magical golden bows with incendiary arrows! Earn money by participating in the tournament.

title: Color Race Obby
description: Color Race Obby is an exciting game inspired by Roblox and Obby. Compete with players online on a field of colored blocks. Enter the race and become the champion! Join the fun!

title: Chess Online
description:
Options:
- Choose an opponent from 18 difficulty levels from Beginner to World Champion
- Selection of time control modes: Unlimited, Bullet, Blitz, Rapid, Classic
- Highlighting possible moves when choosing a piece
- Cancel the move, if there was a yawn, you can go back
- Interactive hints, showing the best move during the game
- Analysis after the game, highlights mistakes and gives recommendations on how to play
- Replay the game from the right place
- Setting the handicap

title: Mini Games Relax Collection 2
description: Relax and take a mini-game tour! Mini Games: Relax Collection 2 brings you a series of casual and fun mini-games, designed for you to relax in your spare time! There are various types of games,each easy to play and extremely fun, allowing you to immerse yourself easily in the game world.

title: Vex 9
description:
Vex 9 is here- the next evolution in the legendary stickman platformer series! Take your parkour skills to the limit as you run, jump, and slide your way through a brand-new set of Acts filled with dangerous traps, bombs, and other deadly surprises. 

For the first time ever, take to the skies with the powerful new Jetpack! Put your reflexes to the ultimate test in the all-new Challenge Mode! Can you conquer every challenge and become the ultimate Vex champion?

title: BFF Easter Photobooth Party
description: Step into the whimsical world of the “BFF Easter Photobooth Party” and celebrate the joyous holiday with your best friends! Join in on the festive fun as you dress up in vibrant Easter-themed outfits, pose for adorable photos in the photobooth, and create lasting memories together. With colorful props, festive decorations, and endless laughter, this is the perfect way to capture the spirit of Easter and enjoy a delightful day with your BFFs.

title: Chess Duel
description: Master the art of chess with three exciting modes, each offering flexible time settings to suit every player. Take your chess skills to the next level, climb the ranks from Bronze to Diamond and strive to become a top chess player.

title: Idle Dice 3D: Incremental Game
description:
In this game, you roll dice and accumulate coins. Upgrade dice to generate more coins, even when you are not actively playing (Offline earnings).

Idle Dice 3D stands out with its variety of dice: from classic six-sided to dice with 2, 4, 8, 10, 12, and 20 sides. Aim for combinations like pairs, triples, straights, and more to increase profit.

The Prestige system allows you to reset your progress to boost future earnings, adding a strategic element to the game. The game also has achievements.

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: Cat Evolution 2
description:
Tap. Evolve. Dominate the Cat Kingdom!

The cats are back, and this time, they're taking over with the power of your fingertips! In Cat Evolution 2,  evolution goes clicker-style.
Tap your way through generations of quirky cats, unlock bizarre and adorable mutations, evolve to the max.

Get your paws ready and your fingers tapping. Cat Evolution 2 is the ultimate idle cat clicker you didn’t know you needed!

title: Pet Connect Match
description: Pet Connect Match is an interesting matching game, in this game, you need to connect the same pets to eliminate all of them.  There are many different modes you can choose, you can pass levels, challenge time mode or just play without any limit. Have a good time!

title: Lucky Vegas Blackjack
description: Enter the Lucky Vegas casino and unwind with a game of blackjack. Calculate the chances of winning and make split-second decisions, that will help you win against your opponents.

title: Zombie Space Episode II
description: There has been an outbreak of a zombie virus on a space station. The first group of mercenaries has disappeared. Your task is to find survivors among the zombies and find out the cause of the zombie apocalypse. You will have to fight with a horde of zombies, using different types of weapons. Look for hidden weapons in chests. Upgrade characters and weapons! Use your characters' abilities in heated battles against zombies. Play with a friend on the same device or alone!

title: Golf Mini
description: Golf Mini is a fun and addictive game in which your goal is to get the ball to the hole in the minimum number of strokes. Complete levels, each of which is a unique golf course with various obstacles and traps.

title: Broken City Combat
description: Immerse yourself in the chaotic battleground of Broken City Combat, a fast-paced FPS set in a desolate urban warzone. As the city crumbles under relentless attacks, you are tasked with surviving the brutal onslaught while rescuing survivors and taking down ruthless enemies. Navigate through abandoned streets, derelict buildings, and multi-floor complexes, each filled with challenges and surprises.

title: Scary Baby Yellow Game
description:
You have a new babysitting job, and things are becoming odd. Feed him, give him a bedtime tale, and avoid falling into his nightmares about him. How long can you maintain control?

Try to care for a weird infant in a lonely and unusual residence. Look for the baby in each area and follow the directions to reach your objective and finish the level.

title: Head Jump
description: run, jump, and climb to avoid direct collisions. Head Jump is a casual game, with a very fast runner forcing you to have a quick response to avoid obstacles, beautiful music will make you addicted to playing this game, difficult levels will stimulate tension and challenge adrenaline, complete each level to continue to improve your playing skills.

title: Wire Connect
description:
Captivating puzzle game where your task is to connect electrical devices to power outlets by drawing conductive paths. But be careful — electricity will flow along your lines, and if it touches water or bystanders, it will cause a short circuit!

Your goal is to find a safe route, avoid all hazards, and complete the level successfully.
Each new puzzle demands focus, logic, and precision. As you progress, the challenges become more complex, with more obstacles, devices, and tricky scenarios.

title: Fish Land Fish World
description: Explore a colorful underwater world full of fishing excitement. In Fish Land - Fish World, you’ll become a fishing expert in this relaxing idle fishing adventure! This game combines simulation and fishing elements. Allow you to fish, expand your pond, and grow your aquatic world.

title: Kitty Couple Lovely Valentine
description: Celebrate love with the adorable kitty duo Angela and Tom in Kitty Couple Lovely Valentine. This charming game takes players on a delightful journey filled with fashion, hidden surprises, and puzzles. Help the cute couple prepare for their special Valentine’s Day by dressing them up, uncovering hidden hearts, and completing their couple photo puzzle.

title: Last Standing
description: Players are dropped onto a map and start without weapons. The map is scattered with a wealth of weapons and equipment. Players need to constantly explore and collect these resources to enhance their survival ability and combat power. The core goal of the game is to be the last survivor. Usually, there are multiple players in each game, and they are randomly distributed on the map.

title: Ocean Small Hospital Doctor
description: Dive into the exciting world of Ocean Small Hospital - Doctor! This casual and educational game is an absolute blast for animal lovers. In this game, you'll step into the role of a heroic doctor on a submarine-turned-hospital. Your mission? Rescue injured sea animals from the vast ocean depths. As you spot a distressed creature, quickly assemble your medical team and gear.

title: Plug Man Race
description: Plug Head Race plays like a collecting arcade game with battery items. To win the level, you need to overpass the finish line in first place. Each platform requires a lot of red battery items, collect them, and use them to pass the current switch. When you are weaker than others, keep away from them and collect red battery items only.  Remember to buy your favorite skins when you have enough gold coins.

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Chinese Food Chef DuDu
description: Are you a fan of Chinese food? Do you want to discover the mystery of delicious Chinese cuisine? You do not want to miss this cooking game - Chinese Food Chef DuDu. Here, you have the chance to learn different recipes of traditional Chinese food, such as dumplings, rice dumplings, and zongzi. Win the heart of the little monkey with your delicious Chinese food!

title: Jail Prison Van Police Game
description:
Get ready for action-packed gameplay! Take on the role of a police officer, drive the prison van, and ensure the secure transport of criminals in this exciting Police Bus Game

Immerse yourself in the intense world of law enforcement with the Jail Prison Van Police Game. Assume the role of a dedicated police officer tasked with transporting high-profile criminals in a specially designed prison van.

title: Tile Fruits
description: In Tile Fruits, embark on a delectable adventure packed with vibrant fruits and captivating challenges! This 2D tile-matching game tests your strategic prowess as you aim to connect three identical fruits to advance through progressively difficult levels. Each match removes the fruits from the board, but beware: having more than seven different types of fruits on the board at once results in a loss.

title: Football Fun
description: Play as a team of 3 players against your opponents. Score goals and deflect attacks. Become the best player! The game has a store where you can buy many different balls and even stadiums. And the best players get on the leaderboard.

title: Italian Brainrot Find the Stars
description: Play Italian Brainrot Find the Stars game online and for free. Find out the hidden stars in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden stars. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: Spinning Uia Uia Cat Bricker
description: Spinning Uia Uia Cat Bricker is a fun and addictive brick-breaking game where a lively cat motivates you with cheerful meows. Your goal is to clear all the bricks without dropping the ball. As you break more bricks, the cat gets even more excited, dancing and playing around. With colorful graphics and dynamic gameplay, this game offers a delightful experience for players of all ages. Stay sharp and keep up!

title: Square World 3D
description: Square World 3D invites you into a completely open and huge craft world. In this world, you can use dozens of items / mines to design most of the things you can imagine and take actions in a world of your own.
