For example, first design, then fly over your unique design using the flying mode! This wonderful simulation game may become addictive for you. It is possible to design a completely different world in every game.

title: Maze Cube 2048
description:
Dive into a world of challenging puzzles that test your strategic skills!
Become a true maze master! To conquer each level, you must carefully think ahead and plan your moves. The puzzles start easy, but watch out each new maze brings a greater challenge.

title: Visual Memory Drag Drop
description: Immerse yourself in a thrilling memory challenge where you need to memorize patterns and recreate them by dragging and dropping circles. This game starts off easy, allowing you to get comfortable with the mechanics, but the difficulty ramps up quickly, especially by the time you reach the fifth level. Each round presents a new pattern to remember, testing your memory and attention to detail. The engaging gameplay and increasing difficulty make it a perfect test for your cognitive skills.

title: Pop Adventure
description: Welcome to Pop Adventure, an addictive bubble shooter game that offers endless entertainment and relaxation to players of all ages. Match 3 balls to explode and clear all bubbles on the screen to complete the mission and win rewards

title: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure
description: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure is a casual battle game designed for brave boys who love fast-paced action and nonstop adventure. Control fearless heroes as you battle enemies, avoid traps, and blast your way through nervous levels. Defeat monsters to constantly upgrade. Choose your skills to ensure your survival or increase your damage! Keep moving to avoid enemy attacks! Complete all levels to win. Get coins to unlock a variety of awesome weapons. Like darts, axes, etc.

title: College Girl Coloring Dress Up
description:
BFF high school fashion makeover: coloring book & cool dress up games for girls!
New college girls dress up game & coloring book is here for you! Dress up the most popular high school girls, create their whole look, paint and color. These cool coloring pages and clothes design features made especially for fashion girls. Begin total fashion makeover with our girl dress up games!

Design outfits like a fashionista: dress up, choose hairstyle, necklaces and other amazing accessories such as skirts and dresses. Select a color and click on the fragment you want to color, when the painting of college girl is created, start drawing and coloring, become BFF fashion clothes designer.

Take screenshots, save as wallpaper, and share cute coloring pages with your friends and family absolutely for free.

title: Submarine Attack
description: Command a submarine, destroy enemy ships with torpedoes, unlock new weapons, and conquer the ocean. Engage in thrilling naval battles, use unique abilities, face numerous enemies, and wield powerful armaments to achieve victory.

title: Juicy Match
description: Tired of candies? Dive into Juicy Match and explore a world of natural, fresh, and juicy delights! You run the best Juice Bar in town, where you match a variety of fruits, from tropical to classic, to create the perfect juice blends. Your cheerful friend, Tiki will guide you with tips and tricks. Match three or more identical fruits to juice them and complete levels. Create chain reactions for extra bonuses and points. Enjoy a refreshing, juicy adventure with Juicy Match!

title: Stick: Tactics & Destruction
description: Stick: Tactics & Destruction! For fans of Stick War, Teardown, and Playground. Limited ammo, grenades, monsters, explosions. Destroy everything and win!

title: Offroad Island
description: "Offroad Island" is an exciting racing game where you compete with different vehicles, earn money by completing missions, and customize your vehicles by upgrading them. Each map offers an adventure full of challenges. Are you ready for a journey full of speed and excitement?

title: Frost Defense
description:
❄️ Embark on a thrilling journey through a frozen wilderness in Frost Defense, a strategic tower defense game that puts your tactical skills to the test! ??

In this action-packed adventure, you'll take on the role of a lone survivor ?‍♂️ battling against the relentless onslaught of arctic creatures ??‍❄️?.
The enemy is merciless — only your ingenuity and strategic prowess can keep you alive in this harsh frozen world. ⚔️?️

title: Easter Glamping Trip
description: This Easter, our princesses are going glamping in the mountains to relax under the sun all day long. For that, they booked the most Instagrammable glamping place in Norway, and now they need your help to get their outfits ready for the fancy trip. Play the Easter Glamping Trip game for girls, and see what jaw-dropping holiday looks you can put together for them. Then get ready to discover new challenging tasks as you continue playing this Easter game for girls. Have a blast!

title: Merge Cube Challenge
description: Merge Cube Challenge offers a unique 2048 experience with its innovative endless mode. You can play alone or compete with your friends. Also, test your strategy and quick thinking skills by competing against the CPU. In endless mode, try to get the highest score by using the bomb special power. With the excitement increasing with each move, collect points and leave your opponents behind! Are you ready to immerse yourself in this excitement?

title: Flight Sim Air Traffic control
description: Flight Sim is a game where you have to guide aircraft to their landing zones, keep the skies safe to complete the levels to get high score.

title: Commando Force 2
description: Get ready for a gun games adventure with Commando Force 2! Jump into a fast-paced shooter! Join the fun and dive into the action! Unlock new weapons, dominate the maps, and show everyone what you’ve got!

title: Toilet Time
description: Toilet Time is more than just a puzzle game—it’s a hilarious journey into the quirkiest parts of everyday life. Challenge yourself with toilet-inspired puzzles that combine creativity, wit, and humor.

title: Bubble Shooter Remastered
description: Shoot groups of bubbles and form groups to make them pop. Form groups of 3 or more bubbles of the same color to make the bubbles explode.

title: Dino Simulator City Attack
description:
In the year 2024, not only are dinosaurs no longer seen, but they live peacefully with humans in the urban center. Not quite at peace, however!

Play as one of several prehistoric dinosaur species in this free 3D game where you may run, crush, demolish, leap, disturb, and do just about everything else you can imagine. Each level has its own set of objectives that you must accomplish in order to access the next. Picking your favorite dinosaur from the list of possible species is also an option.

title: Catch Thief
description: Catch Thief is an addictive puzzle game where you must outsmart a clever thief and stop his escape. Take control of the police, block every possible path and drive the criminal into a dead end. With each new level the challenge grows, requiring you to plan ahead, think strategically and act quickly. Bright cartoon graphics, fun scenarios and increasing difficulty make Catch Thief a perfect choice for fans of logic games who enjoy testing their skills, attention and reaction speed.

title: Pinball VS Zombie
description: Dive into Pinball Zombie Defense, the ultimate fusion of pinball chaos and zombie tower defense! Plant defensive flora to create a ricocheting battlefield where high-speed pinballs smash into plants, unleashing bullet barrages on undead waves. Auto-collect sunlight to grow stronger defenses and hold the line—don't let a single zombie reach your house!

title: Basketball Damage
description: Basketball bounce is an addictive endless basketball game. You can control the ball as you like. Time your tapping perfectly to score before the clock runs out. Keep going as long as you can!

title: Popping Pets
description: In Popping Pets, stack and match adorable pets to score points! Connect three or more adjacent pets to clear them before time runs out. Look out for bombs for big clears and big points. Can you reach the highest score in one minute?

title: Drive Ahead Sports
description: Want to begin a pixelated sports showdown like no other? In Drive Ahead! Sports, you’ll be behind the wheel of amazing vehicles, engaging in exciting soccer matches! Enjoy the rush of driving and the fun of the game! Use your skills to kick the ball, attack the opponent's goal, and aim for victory!

title: Phrasle Master
description: Guess words of wisdom, proverbs and sayings in a fun brainteaser. Tap the words to make a phrase, and try to solve a riddle in 5 attempts using the color hints. As you progress, hidden phrases get longer, so you will need to apply all your logic and puzzle-solving skills to cope with the solve the riddles. Besides, such word games let you expand your vocabulary and learn foreign languages in a fun way. So, prove your skill as you decipher witty quotes and proverbs in a free word game online.

title: Skibronx Runner
description: Make your way through the streets in this endless runner game while you encounter various challenges. In the level mode its your goal to reach the grocery store without losing. In the endless mode your goal is to reach as far as possible without losing.

title: Supermarket Sort: Grocery Game
description: Sharpen your sorting skills, challenge your brain, and race against the clock in each level. With increasingly tricky puzzles and tons of grocery items to sort, the fun never stops!

title: Crazy 2248 Link - Matching Puzzle Game
description: 2248 is a classic number merge link matching puzzle game. The player's challenge goal is to merge the number blocks into 1024, 2048, 4096, and finally reach the infinity block!

title: STELLAR GUARDIAN
description: Stellar Guardian – Cosmic Defense Force is a fast-paced space shooter where you command powerful ships, unlock upgrades, and defend the galaxy across challenging missions and game modes. to fix the lag you need to keep the PC on a full screen, while on other devices it runs smoothly

title: Future War: Bot Battle in Space 3D
description: Future War: Bot Battle in Space 3D is a real-time strategy game that rewards creativity, depth of strategy, and adaptability. Victory depends on your ability to design and deploy customizable and programmable units to dominate the battlefield.

title: Draw To Smash!
description:
Draw To Smash — a logic puzzle game in which you should draw a line, scribbles, figures or doodles to smash all the bad eggs.

Draw To Smash is an amusing logic game that will test your IQ and raise your intellectual abilities to a new level. Plan every step, estimate a possible outcome and build tactical strategies. Solve logical puzzles, pass interesting levels and open bonus levels.

title: Prásino
description: Prasino is a free-to-play forest adventure game that combines exploration, survival, and environmental restoration. As nature’s last hope, your mission is to travel through beautiful landscapes, collect magical seeds, and revive the forest by planting trees. Along the way, you must watch out for dangerous enemies and manage your breath carefully to keep exploring deeper into the wild.

title: Mosquito Bite 3d
description: Play the role of a buzzing mosquito and start a fun simulator. Flying through various environments to find your target and attack her. Your goal is to find the best moment to sneak up on your target and bite her. Your tasks such as attacking a human's head or legs. But be careful, your target might swat at you at any time.

title: BOMBAMAN 3D
description: Blast your way through a thrilling 3D adventure! Use bombs to destroy obstacles, defeat monsters, and uncover power-ups. Find the hidden gate before time runs out, battle bosses, and unlock upgrades. Play solo or with a friend for nonstop action-packed fun!

title: Festival Vibes Makeup
description: Join Ellie in Festival Vibes Makeup, a vibrant game radiating the spirit of the summer festivals. Delight in creating neon, boho-Aztec, and grunge makeup looks as you test your makeup artist skills in this colorful makeup game for girls. Mix, match, and shine with stunning eyeshadows, mascaras, lipsticks, and glitter eyebrows!

title: Gladiator Fights
description: An action game based on battles with gladiators, where players can plunge into the world of ancient Rome and become real warriors. The game offers an exciting and dynamic gameplay where players have to go through many challenges and defeat a number of dangerous opponents.

title: Italian Brainrot Tung Tung Racing
description: Italian Brainrot Tung Tung Racing is a hyper-chaotic, turbo-charged racing game where logic goes to die and only the wildest survive. In a world where speed meets absurdity, you’ll choose from a trio of outrageous racers, strap into your customized Formula car, and blast through tracks so insane they might just melt your brain. This isn’t your average kart racer—this is pure, high-octane brainrot.

title: Idle Pizza Business
description: Grow your own pizza empire by hiring staff, expanding your shop, and earning more money in this 3D idle business simulator!

title: Eat Donuts
description: Swap, rotate, and smash colorful donut rings in a vibrant 3x3 grid to create explosive matches and devour points like never before. Start with easy levels like our sunny beachside challenge—rack up scores to hit that juicy target of 800, earn shiny coins for power-ups like the mighty hammer smash or speedy rotates, and unlock endless waves of mouthwatering fun.

title: Blind Boat Shooting Master
description: Craft your raft and navigate through the colorful world. Take aim and fire to vanquish foes and gather riches. Featuring a unique comic book aesthetic and a diverse roster of over 30 characters, Raft Wars provides endless hours of fun for players of all skill levels. Dive into engaging turn-based battles against other pirates, thieves, and raft fighters as you journey across various lands and discover new territories. Dont miss out on the excitement - join the adventure today!

title: Zumba Story
description: Explore every corner of the jungle, create combinations and shoot colorful marbles. With each level, face unique challenges and utilize powerful boosters to enhance your skills. Unlock exciting chapters, conquer obstacles, and experience a vibrant journey full of surprises!

title: Mermaids Spot The Differences
description: Dive into an enchanting underwater world with "Mermaids: Spot The Differences"! Explore vibrant ocean scenes teeming with mermaids and sea creatures as you sharpen your observation skills to uncover subtle distinctions. Immerse yourself in the magic of the deep blue and embark on an adventure of keen-eyed discovery!

title: Last Day On Earth Survival
description: Last Day on Earth: Survival is a 2D survival simulation game. In this large ruined city, you have 51 locations to discover. When you collect some wood and metal, you can make weapons on the Workbench. When you win enough experience and level up, you can check your Attribute and upgrade HP, ATK, Speed, and Search. In the day, explore and go to places you have never visited. I hope you will survive 50 days and explore all 51 locations.

title: Mini Obby War Game
description:
Manage your little character and see him through the never-ending conflict in Mini Obby War Game, an action-packed 3D game set in a Roblox environment.

With over ten unique and challenging levels, this amazing game is within your reach. Keep sprinting to avoid being caught by the waves of enemy troops who will shoot you if they see you, and aim and fire at all adversaries.

As you defeat enemies, you'll find coins that may be used to unlock additional characters with unique abilities.

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans 2
description: Classic platformer with shooting. Stickman got into the world of Minecraft, flooded with zombie people and zombie animals. Help Stickman destroy all the infected, save Eve and get out of this world.

title: Cryptograph
description: This is a fascinating word puzzle game based on cryptograms. In the game, it is necessary to decipher words using numerical encoding. The gameplay is designed for sequential completion of levels, where each level is a quote or motivational saying. The game allows you to train your attention. A great way to have a pleasant time.

title: Eye Attack - Toilet Monster War
description:
Help Secret Agent to survive in Toilet War! Solve puzzles and prevent toilet invasion in our world!

Every single level in Eye Attack: Toilet Monster War is an unique challenge that will train your logic and shooting skills. Only the smartest players can solve all the puzzles and destroy all the Toilet Monsters on the level. Try to get three stars on each level! Can you?

Try this Trending Toilet Monster game and join the fight against the Toilet Monsters!

title: Squid Game Hunter
description: Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game – a fast-paced game for stealthy and strategic players that takes you on a wild adventure as a hunter with a deadly knife. With multiple Squid games enemies to kill, challenging missions to complete, and rewards to collect, this game will test your skills and keep you on the edge of your seat.

title: Just Slap It!
description:
Just Slap It is a fun and lighthearted slap-based game where timing and accuracy are key. Compete in slap battles, perfect your timing, and climb the leaderboard to showcase your skills.

With simple controls and engaging gameplay, challenge yourself to out-slap opponents and rise to the top. Unlock upgrades and enjoy quick, casual fun anytime.

title: Summer Connect
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with summer theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles can't have more than 2 corners. Some levels the tiles can auto slide( to left, to right, to up, to bottom). Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching summer tiles with 30 puzzle stages in this game.

title: Super Sniper Missions
description: Are you ready to experience an exciting first-person shooter game, Super Sniper Missions gives you an addictive shooting experience. You travel through various cities as a sniper who upholds the city's justice. Your mission is to kill the criminals within a limited time while keeping the hostages safe. Unlock and collect M74, 98K, and other sniper rifles, join us Save the hostages, and become the army's top sniper!

title: Get To The Chopper
description: Gear up and fight your way to safety in Get To The Chopper, a thrilling 3D first-person shooter where every mission is a battle for survival! Your objective is clear: reach the extraction chopper while eliminating all enemies standing in your way. Armed with a fully customizable loadout—including a primary gun, secondary weapon, grenades, and a melee weapon—you’ll face waves of enemies across dynamic battlefields such as forests, deserts, and more.

title: Cards: Klondike Solitaire
description:
A classic card game known for its simple and fun mechanics. If you love solitaire games, then this game is just for you! A famous card puzzle game that is popular among players all over the world.
Perfectly relaxing!

title: Belote 3in1
description:
Play 3 of the most popular card games with smart & powerful AI co-players, who won’t forget the game’s rules:
- French Belote – the original: a trick-taking game played by four players in two teams, using a 32-card deck, and featuring Ace-Ten cards. 
- Contrée – a variant of Belote with advanced bidding options.
- Coinche – a variant of Belote with even further advanced bidding options, declarations, and No Trumps & All Trump modes.

title: Supermarket Cashier Simulator
description:
Practice being the best cashier in the supermarket. Become a mathematician by calculating and entering prices of grocery items and giving change to your customers. By playing you also improve your mathematical skills with the calculator in the game. This game is suitable to be played by adults or teenagers.

With the supermarket cashier game, you will improve your skills and concentration in calculating and also increase your level of accuracy.

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: Car Care Repair DuDu Mechanic
description: Car Care Repair DuDu Mechanic is a casual simulation game where you act as a skillful mechanic. Your clients meet diverse problems with their cars: broken windows, cracked car doors, flat tires, malfunctioning motors, lack of car parts...

title: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire
description: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire is the classic one lower one higher solitaire you know and love. It sounds easy: just remove cards from the board one higher or lower than the next card in the deck. But there's a whole other world behind these simple rules! The constantly changing locations and new cards on the board will keep you on your toes using new strategies. Don't expect to be an expert if you don't play for a couple weeks!

title: Murder Stone Age
description: Test your instincts in Murder Stone Age, a suspenseful tap-based thriller. Watch your back as mysterious figures follow you. One of them may mean harm. Tap to glance behind just in time: guess wrong and it's over. Can you outwit the stalker and survive?

title: Wood Color Block
description: Step into the colorful puzzle world of Wood Color Block, where strategy and quick thinking collide. Slide vibrant blocks into place, match them with their crushers, and clear the board before time runs out. With each level, the puzzles grow more challenging, pushing your skills to the limit.

title: Dogs vs Aliens
description: Your favorite pets have been kidnapped by evil aliens! Hurry to save them and punish the alien bullies. Evolve to defeat stronger enemies, free new dogs, get unique resources so that your dogs can evolve! Collect all the dog breeds and see how cool they will be! Discover new territories, visit the beach, park, city square and forest!

title: Cozy Garden Idle
description: Unwind with this soothing and adorable place. Reveal, pick, and nurture attractive plants to extend your garden and provide more oxygen!

title: Bomb Evolution
description: Bomb Evolution is a cannon-shooting arcade game. On the mysterious and mist-shrouded island, you have the opportunity to strategically establish not one, but three main bases, bolstered by an additional rocket. Engage in an enthralling battle against a formidable opponent, both of you operating under identical circumstances. Your ultimate objective: obliterating all the enemy's main bases positioned on the neighboring fog-laden island. May victory in this war be your prized accomplishment!

title: Real Flight Simulator
description: Real Flight Simulator plays like an airplane driving simulation game with 3D models. In 6 levels, you can learn how to drive an airplane including starting, steering, and landing. All of the complicated instrument panels are simplified for players to learn. The more expensive the airplane you drive, the better acceleration of it you can enjoy including the Power, Speed, Solution, and Brake. Good luck in the sky!

title: Ninja Spell Match
description: Ninja Spell Match is a fast-paced blend of match-3 puzzling and ninja action. Connect tiles to charge up your attacks and unleash devastating moves against waves of enemies. With each level, the challenge grows tougher as you fight your way through 30 unique stages packed with traps, puzzles, and rival ninjas. Think fast, match smart, and strike hard—your reflexes and strategy are the only way to survive.

title: Is it right
description:
This puzzle game will challenge your wits and attentiveness - do it right!
Look for pumping logic, look for the right colors, go through levels, open skins!

title: Army Fight 3d
description: Begin the nervous army battles in Army Fight 3D. Here you need strategic thinking and quick reflexes.In this fun action battle game, you aim to build a powerful army. Defend your base, and defeat the enemy. Start by creating and upgrading your army.

title: Fish Jam
description: This game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts. The fish is trapped on the beach, and you need to come up with a reasonable moving plan to release the fish one by one from the crowded scene. Strategize to free the trapped fish on the beach, testing your problem-solving skills. With numerous levels that increase in difficulty, it's a great way to pass the time.

title: Candy Rain 5
description: Get ready for a delightful and vibrant match-3 experience with Candy Rain 5! The beloved Candy Rain series continues with even more sugary fun and challenging puzzles to enjoy.

title: Flappy Rush
description: flappy rush is a simple casual game. touch to fly, hold to hover and release to fall. in this game your agility will be tested, pass obstacles and don't crash to stay alive, enjoy the music and complete levels that challenge your adrenaline

title: Easter Shadow Match
description: It is an educational as well as fun game for kids. Just look the photo displayed in the left box and click correct shadow of the photo in right panels. Each time you select correct shadow, 200 points will be added to your score. On clicking the wrong shadow 40 points will be deducted from your score.

title: Autumn Glam Gala
description: Get ready for the ultimate fall beauty adventure at the Autumn Glam Gala! Help three BFFs create stunning makeup looks for the most anticipated gala of the season. From soft, natural tones to bold, sparkling colors, you’ll have endless fun choosing makeup, hairstyles, and glamorous outfits. Experiment with fall-inspired looks and fashion trends to ensure each girl shines at the gala. Are you ready to showcase your makeup artist skills? Play Autumn Glam Gala now and let the glam begin!

title: Toy Rumble 3d
description: Begin an explosive toy adventure in Toy Rumble 3D. A 3D running and racing arcade game packed with action, speed, and strategy. Move your tank through chaotic obstacle courses, collect parts, assemble your cannon, and shoot your way to victory.

title: Disk Rush
description: Disk Rush is a reaction-based arcade game where players must quickly sort colored disks into their matching zones. The game challenges your speed and accuracy as disks appear faster over time. With simple tap mechanics and increasing difficulty, Disk Rush tests your ability to think and act quickly under pressure.

title: Math Duck
description:
You play as a fearless duck who battles enemies not with brute force, but with math smarts.

The rules are simple but addictive:
- Pick from shuffled number cards and combine them to make 10.
- Each correct match becomes your attack to damage enemies.
- Defeat foes, earn XP, and level up your duck!

Every level-up lets you choose from 3 unique upgrades. Each run is different, and your choices shape the way your duck fights.

Sharpen your mind, master the numbers, and guide your duck to victory!

title: Farm Triple Match
description:
Looking for a fun tile-matching puzzle game? Try Farm Triple Match, a fresh take on tile-matching for puzzle lovers! This mahjong-inspired game is easy to learn but offers exciting challenges.
Beat levels and build your own farm with cute animals and a lovely garden.
Classic gameplay with a modern twist for relaxing brain training.
Explore a variety of tiles featuring fruits, veggies, animals, and more.
Use boosters to conquer tough puzzles and keep progressing. No time limits—play anytime!

title: Cat Escape
description: Play Cat Escape, the viral cat puzzle hide-and-seek game now free online! Sneak past guards, dodge traps, and guide your kitty to safety across hundreds of stealth levels. Unlock skins, collect coins, and outsmart enemies in this browser cat game loved worldwide. Want the full mobile experience? Discover more at CatEscapeTheGame.com

title: Math Obby
description: Combine your math skills with parkour prowess in Math Obby, an engaging Roblox experience that challenges players with arithmetic problems amidst obstacle courses. Navigate through stages that test both your agility and your knowledge of addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Earn badges as you progress and showcase your mastery in this educational adventure.

title: Sea Battle Admiral
description:
Do you remember your favorite childhood entertainment with paper and pencils?
Then, immerse yourself in the exciting sea battles on your device's screen.
The classic paper-based tabletop naval combat game is here!
Enjoy exciting naval battles, strategy, and adrenaline.

title: Triangles
description:
If you like to organize your thoughts while playing, then "Triangles" is the game for you.
Combine, connect and match blocks in this exciting challenge that will test your logic skills. This king of puzzles will train your brain and help develop your logic and mental abilities. Don't let the shapes fill the hex grid!
The game will be interesting to fans of games with blocks.

title: Home Design: Small House
description: A game of arranging and design rooms. In the game, the player will play the role of a small housekeeper, classifying items in the room and then placing them neatly in appropriate positions to make the room neat and tidy. The game is very easy and fun.

title: Turbo Race 3D
description: Get ready for intense action in Turbo Race 3D! Upgrade your car’s speed, acceleration, grip, and brakes to dominate the competition. Use shields and boosters to gain an edge, and customize your ride with decals and colors. Race through 3 exciting worlds—city, desert, and snow—while evading traffic and outpacing opponents on thrilling highways. Do you have what it takes to be the ultimate racer?

title: Sudoku
description: Sudoku is a relaxing yet challenging number puzzle game made for Jio feature phones. Fill the 9×9 grid with numbers 1 to 9 without repeating any in a row, column, or 3×3 box. Choose from different difficulty levels and test your logic skills. The game works offline, saves your progress automatically, and offers smooth performance with clean visuals for KaiOS devices.

title: Garden Guardians
description:
A fun and strategic tower defense game that’s easy to pick up!
Tap directional arrows to launch seeds into flowerpots—each seed blossoms into a powerful flower ready to blast incoming zombies. Plan your moves, hold the line, and protect your garden from the undead horde!

title: Bowling Stars
description: Enjoy a classic game of bowling with simple and fun gameplay. Earning trophies will unlock better bowling balls and help you win against more skilled opponents.

title: Crash Car Parkour Simulator
description:
Test the cars in a real crash test!

You need to get to the finish line, but on the way you will meet many obstacles. Car presses, huge hammers and much more will try to crush you and turn your car into trash. Show real car driving skills.

title: Hexa Sort
description: Hexa Sort offers a delightful blend of puzzle challenges, strategic matching, and satisfying merging experience. Engage your mind with stimulating brain games that involve clever puzzle solving and logical maneuvers, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a mental workout.

title: Hunting underwater spearfishing
description:
Hunting underwater spearfishing – a realistic diving adventure!

Dive into underwater exploration as a diver in a wetsuit, hunting with scuba gear. Explore lakes, seas, and oceans, encounter 30+ marine species, and marvel at coral reefs. Freediving, underwater hunting, and treasure searches await! Upgrade harpoons, masks, and tanks, battle predators, and survive hostile depths. Discover new locations and earn rewards to improve with every dive!

title: Tricky Shots
description: This game is about you trying to make the best possible shot. Click and or tap on the marble to begin the aim and drag back for power. Release to shoot.

title: Energy Superman 3D
description: Come to soar through the skies in Energy Superman 3D! This exciting arcade game lets you become a powerful superhero. Your mission is to save the city from monstrous threats. Collect energy orbs,avoid obstacles, and achieve the highest score possible!

title: Sort Resort
description: Unleash your creativity and puzzle-solving skills in this unique game! Your mission: sort colorful liquids into the right flasks while also drawing beautiful pictures. Each level challenges you with tricky sorting tasks, but there's more — as you pour and sort, stunning images will come to life! Enjoy a relaxing yet engaging experience that blends art and logic. Can you master both sorting and drawing? Play now and find out how fun and satisfying it can be!

title: Missile Launch Master
description: Experience the thrill of Boom Missile 3D, a 3D simulation game that will test your missile skills. You will play as a missile pilot who must dodge hot air balloons and helicopters in the sky. You will also have to fly the missile over an island and hit the target before the time runs out. Boom Missile 3D is a game that combines stunning 3D graphics and smooth controls. You will feel like you are in the cockpit of a real missile. Can you complete all the missions and destroy the enemy’s base?

title: Town Run
description: Town Run is an excellent option if you enjoy games that require you to run continuously. It combines action-packed gameplay, vibrant graphics, and infinite running! Catching the raccoon is the goal. You'll need to sprint, leap, avoid obstacles, gather cash, and more in order to accomplish that!

title: Falling Party
description:
Watch the screen, and find the matching image on the ground. You will false if you step on the wrong image
Be fast and push your opponents out of the ground to eliminate them

The only one left standing will be the ultimate winner

title: Traffic Rider
description: Traffic Rider is a first-person driving bike endless game that puts you on a motorbike for an exhilarating ride. With a full career mode, lifelike bike sounds, and detailed graphics, it redefines arcade racing.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Idle Dairy Farm Tycoon
description: Idle Dairy Farm Tycoon is a relaxing and strategic idle game where players grow and manage their very own dairy business. Start by raising cows to produce milk, process raw milk then deliver the fresh milk packages to the market. Automate processes, upgrade your workers and warehouse to maximize efficiency and profits. Your goal is to build the ultimate dairy empire! Perfect for players who enjoy business simulation games.

title: Princess Run 3D
description: Want a magical and exciting running adventure? Step into Princess Run 3D, a fun 3D platform arcade game full of exciting challenges. Play as a fearless princess racing through colorful 3D worlds. Collect beautiful clothes, shoes, hair, etc. Increase your charisma to get a maid of honor. They're going to help you fend off enemies in front of you or dirty mud, rain, etc. Be careful to avoid ugly clothes, costumes, bad weather, etc.

title: Cosmo Pet Starry Care
description: Immerse yourself in the wonderful world of space and get to know cute alien creatures better. Choose your pet and find out how best to take care of them. Feed, walk and play with your space friends to give them happiness and care. Support your pets so that they please you with their devotion and love.

title: Frog Byte
description: Frogbyte is a game about a hungry toad sitting on a leaf that wants to eat all the flies flying through its swamp. Try to catch as many bugs as you can avoiding the bombs, otherwise it will be game over! Make the best score and share it with your friends!

title: Bloons Survival.io
description:
Bloons Survival. io is a fast-paced survival arcade game where you fight off endless waves of balloons!

Control your monkey hero, throw darts automatically, and pop incoming enemies before they get too close.
Collect coins and power-ups to grow stronger, but stay alert — one hit can end your run!

How long can you survive?

title: Mermaid Princess Avater Castle
description: This is a dress-up and decorating game for girls. If you like games where you create your world, you can't miss our game. There is a group of mermaids living in the underwater world and you can live with them and create beautiful memories.

title: Bark & Blast
description: Crash-land on a post-apocalyptic planet in Bark & Blast! Help a brave alien dog survive and escape in this thrilling 2D platformer action RPG. Test your aim, strategy, and courage in an epic adventure. Play now and conquer the challenges!

title: Your dream room
description:
Do you dream of creating the perfect room? 
In this game you will become a real interior designer! 
Have fun, experiment and turn an empty space into a cozy dream corner.
Choose wallpaper, flooring and furniture in different styles. Decorate the room with stylish accessories, add coziness!
Choose the color scheme and arrange items as you like.
Experiment with design, create unique interiors and enjoy the process!
Start creating your dream room now!

title: Fishing Bear
description:
Tap to reel in your fishing line and catch as many fish as you can!
But stay alert—mischievous creatures in the sea will try to get in your way.
And when you pick up a mysterious Treasure Shell… something exciting might happen!
Enjoy a simple and addictive fishing experience!

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Sausage Man Shooting Adventure
description: Dive into a hilarious and action-packed adventure. Sausage Man Shooting Adventure is a fast-paced side-scrolling shooting game where you control a crazy, energetic sausage hero and blast through waves of enemies. Run forward, dodge traps, jump platforms, and shoot enemies with nonstop excitement! Collect airdrops to increase your damage.

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Ramp Car Jumping
description:
A one-touch race, fly, crash game that sends you flying through the air in your car before you smash into everything in your path!

Ramp Car Jumping is the most unusual challenge you’re likely to face this year. 

You literally jump off a ski jump in a car!
Crazy speed
Insane smashes
Maximum heat 
And so many smashes, you’ll get crash burnout!

Challenge your friends to an ol’ fashioned smash off!

What’s the biggest crash you can imagine? Try now and watch it happen!

title: Bolts and Nuts - Puzzle
description:
An educational and exciting game in which you can test your logical and strategic thinking.
Solve unique puzzles to while away the time and relax with excellent soundtrack. A bright and exciting game is perfect not only for children, but will also give you the opportunity to test your skills in solving difficult problems for adults.

title: MR RACER - Car Racing
description: MR RACER - Car Racing is a thrilling and challenging racing game that will excite you! Race at high speed with stunning supercars and beat the traffic. This game provides a very easy-to-control car movement and is extremely fun to race.

title: King Kong Chaos
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure in King Kong Chaos, a modern 2D pixel art game where players must navigate through perilous levels, dodging spiked balls and barrels hurled by a colossal gorilla. Along the way, pick up the pickaxe strategically to destroy incoming barrels and secure the coveted golden banana to progress.

title: Smash the Car to Pieces!
description: Shoot the car with guns. Launch a combat drone or summon a tornado. Ram the car with a giant hammer or blow up all the windows with dynamite. There are many ways to destroy a car waiting for you in this game.

title: Word search
description:
A beautiful word puzzle game with challenging yet addictive features for hunting down the words you love! Train your brain in a fun and relaxing way and take your critical thinking skills and IQ to the next level.
Find all the words on a given topic. Words are arranged horizontally, vertically, diagonally, and may overlap.

title: Incredible Kids Dentist
description: This is a dentist game for kids. Have you ever wanted to be a dentist? If this was your dream before, you should not miss this game. In this educational game, you can become a doctor in a hospital. You need to check the teeth of your patients.

title: Smoke Trail
description:
Drift and earn in this fast-paced 2D endless drifting game!
Master the art of controlled slides across an ever-changing track. Rack up cash by chaining stylish drifts and maintaining momentum—then use your earnings to unlock a growing collection of iconic drift cars, each with its own unique stats and feel. But it’s not just about the money—complete challenges to test your skill, and unlock a special car.

Easy to pick up, hard to master—how far can you go before you crash?

title: Frost Land - Snow Survival
description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.

title: Sort Games Challenge
description: Sort Games Challenge is a puzzle game. Here you can challenge yourself and choose from multiple modes, not limited to one. Your goal is to complete the mission within a limited time to pass the level. Dont underestimate this game, its still very difficult to pass. Come and challenge!

title: Black Jump
description: Escape the war-torn planet in this dynamic jump-and-run game. Sprint through the desolate landscape, vanquish enemies, sidestep deadly traps, and gather valuable crystals.

title: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2
description: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2 takes you to a vibrant town by the beach where you can test your driving and parking skills in a variety of supercars. Complete challenging parking missions while exploring the scenic coastal streets. You can switch cars on the map, but watch out for the police - get caught stealing a vehicle, and it’s game over! Can you master the art of parking in Beach City without getting busted?

title: Grand Mahjong
description: Grand Mahjong is a captivating multi-level puzzle game based on the traditional Chinese Mahjong. Match identical tiles, clear the pyramid, and progress through increasingly challenging levels. This game is perfect for fans of logic games, brain puzzles, and anyone searching for a fun free Mahjong online experience.

title: Spacebar Clicker
description: Set out on an epic cosmic adventure in Spacebar Clicker! Click your way through the space, gather light years, and recruit aliens to supercharge your journey. Unlock awesome rewards and aim for that cosmic jump to the next galaxy. Can you collect enough light years to uncover the secrets of the universe?

title: Matrix Typer
description: Type like a hacker, train like a pro. Dodge incoming code, out-type digital attacks, and prove you can survive inside the system. Every word you type is a bullet dodged; every mistake, a strike you take.

title: Geometry Open World
description: Geometry Open World is a fast-paced 2D action game where players pilot a ship through perilous obstacles, engage in thrilling battles against diverse enemies, and take on epic boss fights. With a vibrant and dynamic open world, strategic upgrades, and powerful abilities, you can chart your own path to triumph. Will you conquer the challenges, defeat the bosses, and rise to become the ultimate champion in this open-world geometric action adventure?

title: Geometry Lite
description: Are you ready for a new adventure in Geometry Lite? The graphics of this game can impress gamers because they're different from the other Geometry Dash versions. This game offers many levels with different backgrounds to players. In this game, your mission is to help geometry to overcome many deadly traps on the road. You can get a victory when your character reaches the exit portal. If you are a beginner, you can improve your skills through practice mode in this game. Let’s enjoy this game now

title: Color Brain Test Games
description: Color Brain Test Game is a ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain?  You love fun spinning circle puzzle games with simple and colorful gameplay. Play Color Brain Test Games now!

title: Ultimate Destruction Simulator
description: Unleash your destructive side in this ultimate demolition experience! Enjoy realistic tower destruction with dynamic physics, and take control of time—slow it down, speed it up, or freeze the action. Experiment with gravity modes, from low to high or even zero gravity, and customize every detail, including debris levels, destructibility, and atmospheric dust. Built for fans of destruction, this game offers the smash-and-crash fun you've been craving!

title: Happy Monsters
description:
The collection of fun games is designed for children of any age and will not leave anyone indifferent.
Monsters play different games in which you need to collect fruits. Help them collect as much as possible to earn postcards with animals. Collect the whole collection of postcards!

title: Street Racing: Moto Drift
description:
Become the king of drifting! Win extreme street motorcycle races, escape from the police and make your way to victory!

**Feel the extreme and drive:** Incredible motorcycle races, chases, drifting and crazy stunts are waiting for you. Feel the drive, enjoy the speed, make exciting drifts and win the race!

**Avoid the chase:** Beware of the police who are trying to catch you!

title: Horseback Survival
description: Embark on a journey of survival in "Horseback Survival," where you, as Zohan, share an unbreakable connection with your horse, Badal. Born on the same day, your unique bond becomes a lifeline when a mysterious event leaves you in a coma. Navigate a zombie-infested world. Engage in intense combat with melee and ranged attacks, outsmart the undead by staying stealthy, and overcome obstacles with strategic running and jumping.

title: Scary BanBan Escape
description:
Scary Players of the realistic survival horror game BanBan Escape will need to devise a plan to get out of a terrifying kindergarten inhabited by terrifying creatures. The game's intriguing storyline and tense atmosphere have garnered a lot of attention in the gaming community, and it all started with Euphoric Brothers.

In Banban Kindergarten, the protagonist is huggy, who plays the role of the searcher. Not only is this school deserted, but it also hides several perils and mysteries.

title: ROYAL COIN RUSH
description: Drag adjacent coins to swap them, and line up three or more vertically or horizontally to remove them. Special coins appear when 4 or more coins are matched. Mix effects by combining special items! The stage is cleared when all the target coins are erased.

title: Mahjong 3D Match
description: Welcome to the 3D Mahjong adventure! Challenge your mind with speed and precision. Plan your moves, view the board from all angles and remove pieces intelligently. Beat increasingly difficult levels, play offline and relax with immersive music.

title: Labubu Jetpack Rush
description: Fly high in Jetpack Jump with Labubu to survive the escape from the lab! Tap to use the jetpack and release to run . Upgrade your jetpack, your running speed and other upgrades to be able to travel further than before and beat your high score. The further you travel the more money you get!

title: Three Chickens
description:
Hurry up! The chickens are coming home to roost.

Drag and drop the chicken into the tiles to match them.

Match 3 or more chickens to eliminate them.

How high can you score in this endless match 3 game?

title: Back To School: Uniforms Edition
description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! This fun dress-up game lets you spin the wheel to unlock school uniforms from countries like Japan, the U.S., the U.K., India, France, and South Korea. Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Downhill Car Ride: Crash Test
description:
Put on a real destructive show!

Forget about safety, in this game you need to check how strong the dummy is. At your disposal is a huge pile of dummies, an abandoned town, an incredibly huge arsenal and complete freedom of action! In this game you can check what will happen if you crash a motorcycle at full speed into a house with dynamite or what will happen if you jump out of the car a second before the accident!

title: Candy Monster Raffi
description: Help the candy monster Raffi eat all the candies! He absolutely loves them – all he wants is to eat candy. But be careful while collecting them! If you jump in the wrong direction, you might hit dangerous spikes. This cute little monster is hungry – run and feed Raffi with as many candies as you can!

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Simple baseball game with fun, cartoony players and easy one-click controls. It’s fast to learn and fun to play!

Unlike other baseball games, the action doesn’t stop after you hit the ball. You need to decide when to run, move to the next base, and try to score runs. It’s all about timing and quick decisions.

Pick one of the best baseball countries and try to win the championship. The game keeps the excitement of baseball but with simple rules, so anyone can enjoy it.

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature “tung-tung!” calls. In this Geometry Dash–inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Overflowing Palette
description:
Test your puzzle-solving skills in Overflowing Palette! Pick the perfect colors, flood the board, and fill every tile before your moves run out. You'll find plenty of levels with different mechanics, an endless mode without a move counter if you want to relax, and the ability to create and share your own levels.

Credits
Based on the puzzle of the same name from the game "Wuthering Waves " by Kuro Games.

title: Body Care Simulator
description: ASMR Cleaning is a fun simulation game on yad.com. There are four sections: foot spa, manicure, lip care, and clean inside the ear. You will enter a quiet and comfortable environment and experience different care processes. Have fun!

title: Horror Hotel: Scary Room
description:
"Horror Room" is a simulator of the owner of a theme park, where visitors come to experience thrills. The player will have to develop his establishment, improving the rooms of fear, buying new decorations and equipment, as well as hiring actors and staff. The goal of the game is to scare as many visitors as possible and make their stay in the park unforgettable.

Scare all your customers!
Buy new creepy rooms!
Monitor the condition of the rooms, clean, repair the equipment.

title: Emoji Frenzy
description:
Test your reflexes and knowledge in this fast-paced emoji matching game! 
Tap the correct emoji before time runs out, build streaks, and unlock new themes. Simple to play, hard to master!

title: Cinema Empire Idle Tycoon
description: Welcome to Cinema Empire Idle Tycoon! Do you dream of owning your own movie theater empire? Now's your chance! In this super fun idle simulation management game, you'll start with a small screening room! Build your own cinema empire! As a theater owner, you need to manage every aspect of the theater. Unlock the theater's facilities, ticket booths, movie halls, dining areas, and more. Hiring employees to help you get more bang for your buck.

title: Race Clicker
description: Race Clicker is an action-packed idle clicker racing game that'll pump up your adrenaline. Customize, upgrade, and speed your way to victory. Each click pushes your limits, every upgrade unveils new possibilities, and each race dares you to click faster. Leave rivals in the dust and satisfy your need for speed with endless excitement. Start your engines and hit the track now!

title: Single Stroke Line Draw
description:
Single Stroke Draw Line is a puzzle game with with one touch line drawing. It is required for you to draw one line to connect all the points without any route repetition.
- The rule is very simple, Draw given figures with only one touch.
- Explore amazing levels of this puzzle at your fingertips and sharpen your brain IQ & skills.
- Game level starts with very easy levels and increases in difficultly as you progress in the game.

title: Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker
description: Get ready for the cutest twist on the viral Brainrot universe! Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker is the baby-themed sequel to the hit Brainrot Clicker! Tap your way through the baby versions of your favorite characters, collect upgrades, and enjoy a whole new atmosphere with colorful visuals, cheerful music, and fresh sound effects designed to fit the playful baby theme!

title: CS: Upgrade Gun
description: The weapon is alive and ready to go hunting! In this fast-paced launcher, you control a cannon that runs itself and shoots at targets. Collect boosters, improve their performance and last as long as possible. The further you go, the more action and explosions!

title: Digger Fighter in the Maze
description: Digger Fighter in the Maze is an action-packed adventure game that takes you deep into a mysterious underground labyrinth filled with secrets, dangers, and treasures. Step into the shoes of a brave digger fighter as you tunnel your way through winding mazes, uncover hidden paths, and gather valuable resources. Along the way, you'll meet and recruit powerful allies, each with unique abilities that can help you overcome obstacles and defeat fierce enemies.

title: Money Maker
description: Money Maker is an addictive strategy and idle game that lets you build your fortune from the ground up. Combine smart investments with clever upgrades to grow your virtual empire. Merge pins, upgrade your Money Machine, and watch your income skyrocket as you master the art of wealth creation. With its vibrant visuals and satisfying progression system, Money Maker turns every click into profit!

title: Brainrot-A Difference Challenge
description: Put your observation skills to the test in Brainrot – A Difference Challenge, the ultimate photo puzzle game! Spot subtle differences between two eerily similar Italian "brainrot" images across a series of mind-bending levels. Each pair of pictures will challenge your focus, attention to detail, and visual memory. Can you find them all before time runs out?

title: TOP HOG
description: Welcome to the forest adventure! A drowsy bear just wants to rest, but a playful group of hedgehogs  has decided to throw a party close by. Your task? Grab a hockey stick and send those troublemakers soaring through the air! Build your strength, collect bonuses to enhance your skills, and face the exciting challenges in each level. Who will rise as the winter forest champion? Become a true bear hockey expert! Simple to play, fun, and packed with thrilling airborne action! Give it a try now!

title: Yes or No Challenge Run
description: This time you will not only run over the platforms and pass through the gates for the next version of yours, but you will also answer questions and earn rewards. Yes or No Challenge Run game comes with lots of features, surprises, and cool questions! Some helper machines or pets will be with you during this adventure. You can embark on this Yes or No adventure either single-player or 2 player. Pick your game mode and let the adventure start!

title: Strykon
description:
Strykon is a mobile FPS game with exciting missions and battles. Play different modes like Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, and Free-for-All, where your goal is to survive.
Choose from many weapons, like pistols, rifles, shotguns, and snipers. Each gun has its own style. Enjoy great graphics, realistic sound, and easy controls. Earn rewards with the Battle Pass to keep the game interesting. Whether you complete missions or fight enemies, this shooter is full of action anytime, anywhere!

title: Turret Gunner
description:
You will find yourself in a thrilling air battle simulation, filled with exciting moments and countless enemy targets. You’ll be able to maneuver, shoot, and fight virtual opponents, experiencing the true adrenaline rush of an airstrike.

This captivating journey into the world of aviation will leave unforgettable impressions on fans of extreme action and flying. Feel like a real pilot and enjoy the excitement of aerial combat!

title: Merge Balls New Years Toys in 3D!
description: ● A game with a New Year's atmosphere! Compete with friends and colleagues?! In the game you have a play area? where balls fall and connect if they have the same color! Connect as many balls as possible to make the biggest one, save up points?! Be the first on the leaderboard?! Play and relax ?!

title: Animal Transform Race
description: Animal Transform Race is a fun game based on reaction where different types of animals compete. Each animal is fast in some areas and very slow in some tracks according to their abilities. Try to lead the race by making the right choices. The faster you make animal choices, the more advantages you gain. You can unlock new animals from the market section with the coins you earn from the races.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: Basketball Stars 2026
description: Basketball Stars is a cool 2 player basketball game by MadPuffers. Prepared for the 2025 basketball season. Choose your team and enter a challenging tournament. Control your player to perform awesome dunks and 3-pointers to win the game. Feel free to block and slap your opponent to knock him out and get the ball, and pay attention to the supershot bar on the top of the screen. Once fully loaded, you can use the hot special dunk from wherever you stand; it never fails. Be the best player!

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Ships 3D IO
description: Ships 3D is an IO game, multiplayer sailing ship simulator. The game is played in 'first person' where you control the sailor and move around the ship; interacting with the helm, sails and cannons. Sink enemy ships and shoot other players to score points.

title: Hidden Object: Street Of Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Street of Secrets is an atmospheric hidden object game where you become the lead detective. A mysterious case awaits, and your insightful assistant is there to help, offering hints and guiding you to crucial details.

title: Tropical Match 2
description: Tropical Match is back with its highly anticipated second sequel! Join your island friend Coco for a colorful Match 3 adventure in a lush tropical paradise. Match juicy fruits, vibrant flowers, and clear away algae and clouds across 1,250+ exciting levels. Complete Daily Missions and discover tropical treasures along the way! With relaxing island tunes and gorgeous scenery, this is the perfect summer escape. Dive in and start your tropical adventure today!

title: Crazy Zoo Swipe - Match 3 Puzzle Game
description: Welcome to the Crazy Zoo. Connect the same animals here to eliminate them. The more you connect, the greater the chance of obtaining powerful props. If you encounter a difficult level after that, use it wisely to let it burst out with unimaginable magic. Energy light waves, successfully pass the level!

title: Home Run Boy
description:
There is a boy who wants to become a home run king.
He's been practicing his batting and his dream is to hit the ball to the end of the world.
Hit the ball, build up your strength, and hit it farther and farther!

title: On Fire Basketball Shots
description: The gym is packed, and the crowd is roaring! The scoreboard's ticking down, and your team is trailing. The only way to win is to sink blazing basketball shots from the court. You're the star player, but the pressure's on—every shot counts, and the hoop's rim is red-hot, making each attempt trickier!

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Cameraman vs Toilets Puzzle
description: Cameraman vs Toilets Puzzle is an exciting game in which you play as Cameraman's Agent, whose task is to destroy all the toilets with the heads of rainbow friends. You have to use your shooting skills to accurately hit each toilet bowl and avoid hitting a Nubian friend.

title: Car Parking Stunt Games 2024
description: Play the new challenging car game on Impossible Tracks in car stunt games 3d of 2024. Join the world of real impossible tracks in car racing games. Experience the real car parking stunt game with no limits of enjoyment. Are you a fan of Hard Parking Games 2024.

title: Freddys Nightmares Return Horror New Year
description:
Immerse yourself in this 3D game there's no need to fear the monster Freddy. To familiarize yourself with the area, play the escape mode. You'll find yourself in a mysterious, forgotten city on New Year's Eve, with snow making escape difficult. Go out of there as quickly as possible and see how far you can go.

Freddy Krueger and his snowman minions will relentlessly pursue and attack you in the second game mode, but you have the option to bring weapons to help you destroy them.

title: Dino Hide N Shoot
description: Do you want to begin a fun dinosaur-themed shooting game in Dino Hide N Shoot? Play a brave gunman on an exciting adventure! In this game, you will constantly run to avoid the attack of dinosaurs.And pick up the bullets, accumulate enough firepower. Pay attention to using the box as cover,seize the moment to shoot at the dinosaur! The gameplay is simple yet challenging.

title: Muscle Up Master
description: The aim of this game that will help you become a muscle master, a boxer or an MMA fighter is to reach the best level! In this adventure where you start with a weak body, start exercising and reach a more muscular body by merging with the characters. As you progress, participate in fighting tournaments and grow faster with the rewards you earn!

title: Off Road Overdrive
description: Off Road Overdrive plays like a side-scrolling car-balanced game with 2D cartoon vehicles. Let me introduce the game modes for you!If you want to make a perfect record, play Challenge mode with different terrains again and again including Snow, Beachwear, Field, Desert, and Dark Night. Even the 2D platform will test your driving skills and balance abilities!

title: Worm: Apple Quest
description:
Get Ready for Challenging Puzzles in Worm: Apple Quest!

In this captivating puzzle platformer, guide your worm to the legendary Golden Apple while navigating devious obstacles and perilous chasms. The secret to success? Mastering your worm's growing length.

Every apple you collect makes your worm longer, unlocking new paths - but beware! With greater length comes tougher control. One wrong turn and you might get stuck, ending your run.

title: Unblock Ball Slide Puzzle
description:
Welcome to Unblock Ball: Slide Puzzle, a classic sliding puzzle game that lets you use your mind.You can feel a sense of accomplishment! Sliding the board to create the channel for the ball to roll smoothly to the end. You should use your logical mind to cleverly move blocks, avoid
obstacles, and solve every puzzle!

title: Fish Love Pins
description: Fish Love Pins is a physics-based game that requires players to actively use their brains to figure out how to complete each level. The game is very easy to play, but as you progress through the levels, the difficulty gradually increases.

title: DIY Makeup Salon - SPA Makeover Studio
description:
Have you ever dreamt of becoming a fashionable DIY make-up stylist in the beauty makeup artist’s salon?

Welcome to the DIY Makeup Salon: SPA Makeover- a fascinating beauty salon game, where you can create fun-filled makeovers for pretty girls! You can showcase your skills as a make-up stylist in our salon. Make use of various tools and facial cleansers to give your model a refreshing skin makeover. There are numerous dress up designs to explore for a flawless make up look!

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Bubble Trouble
description:
Avoid and pop the bubbles! Shoot the bubbles with your harpoon and split them in smaller bubbles, until eventually they disappear.
The classic arcade game from 2002, remastered.
Bubble Trouble (later Bubble Struggle) has been played hundreds of millions of times, labeled 'one of the top 10 online games'.

22 unique levels, for 1 or 2 players (on the same keyboard).
Final boss level.
Challenge other player's scores.

title: Puzzle About Orange
description: Test your mind in Orange Puzzle Quest, a fun fruit puzzle game packed with logic challenges and brain teasers! Match colors, solve tricky levels, and enjoy juicy orange adventures. Perfect for US students searching “puzzle game,” “fruit puzzle,” or “brain puzzle,” this addictive casual game mixes fun with strategy. Can you conquer every orange puzzle and prove your skills? Play now and boost your brainpower while having endless fun!

title: Path ice
description:
Chill the soda, add some ice, but here's the problem, it's not so easy to get into the glass, you need to draw a path for the ice.

Draw the path as you like.
Go through many levels
Discover all kinds of ice and glasses

title: Road Of Fury 4
description: Road Of Fury 4 is a scroller shooter game set in a world of post-apocalypse. Team-up with other nomads, upgrade cars, guns and super-powers and use your skills to fight through 30 levels and 3 bosses.

title: ASMR Beauty Japanese Spa
description: ASMR Beauty Japanese Spa is a relaxing style game where you guide a charming girl through a soothing Japanese hair spa filled with calming treatments and revitalizing masks. Once refreshed, dress her in elegant kimonos, choose delicate accessories, and personalize her look with stunning hairstyles, makeup, and shoes. It's your peaceful retreat into beauty, fashion, and creative expression.

title: Merge Food Puzzle
description: Merge Food Puzzle is a synthetic puzzle game. What is different from ordinary match-3 games is that successful matches will not disappear and will generate higher-level food. The game has two modes: Merge BBQ and Merge Fruit. Merge BBQ has a variety of barbecues waiting for you to unlock, including corn, cauliflower, fish, squid, and more. Have fun!

title: Merge Gun Fps Shooting Zombie
description: Merge Gun: FPS Shooting Zombie's main mission is to shoot down all coming undead creatures before they kill you. Before you join the battle, you can buy more guns and merge the same guns into new advanced ones. With more powerful and fast ammo in the clip, you can deal with incoming enemies more easily. Both zombies and crows will move forward to you even if you are still reloading. Keep calm and shoot the explosive oil cans on the ground if necessary.

title: Bubble Sky
description: Bubble Sky is an ascending Bubble Shooter game that will take you to dizzying heights. Will you be able to reach space? Reach a score of 200000 points to unlock the wheel of fortune and win collectible cards to complete your album!

title: Hole Digger
description: Grab your shovel and start your journey deep into the earth. Mine valuable resources, upgrade your tools, level up your skills, and unlock new opportunities for even faster digging. The deeper you dig, the richer the treasures. Can you reach the very bottom?

title: Nesting Dolls
description: Embark on an exciting adventure with an addictive puzzle game that will challenge your mind and soothe your soul. Immerse yourself in a world of bright colours and intricate Russian matryoshka dolls as you complete tasks to clear the field and become a true matryoshka doll master.

title: Pixel Mini Golf
description:
Mini Golf is a complete game, with 400 different levels, and an addictive system. Have fun exploring the game’s green hills and plains while listening to the birds and enjoying its beautiful views, collect as many coins as possible and try to hit all the holes to achieve the highest score.

Among the game mechanics are levels with: Portals, Boxing Gloves, Cannons, Burners, Impulses, Mill, Sand, Mole Holes, Spikes and Movement Blocks that will help or hinder your game!

title: Shadow Fighter
description:
It's a free side-scrolling role-playing fighting game. Shadow Fighter is perfect for you if you like ninjas, swordsmen, role-playing games, or fighting games. Compared with other RPG fighting
games, this is an excellent PVP game. The game has two main modes: Solo Match and Team Mode. You can also view the leaderboard. In a Solo Match, you have to choose three heroes until one
side is completely wiped out, that is, the other side wins. Don't worry about not having a favorite hero.

title: Powerwash Simulator - 3D Wash
description: There’s no stain too tough, no dirt too thick that you can’t handle. So gear up, point your washer, and get ready to bring the shine back to everything around you.

title: Mineblock Obby
description: Minecraft Obby is an amazing parkour game that you can play totally free! Do your best as you navigate through challenging obstacle courses, avoiding pitfalls and traps along the way. Collect coins scattered throughout each level to buy yourself a new sword and enhance your gameplay experience. With each jump and sprint, you'll improve your skills and push your limits. Dive into the blocky world of Minecraft Obby, avoid obstacles, collect those coins, and most importantly—have fun!

title: Jump to the Mountain for the Brainrots
description:
You'll play as Obby, a character located on a tall mountain.
Various Brainrots will randomly appear on the mountain, guarded by enemies.
Your task is to jump up the mountain and rescue the Brainrots. Collect the entire Brainrot collection without falling into enemy hands!
Sell Brainrots to increase your jump height and reach the very top of the mountain. Rare Brainrot species live at the very top.

title: Javelin Battle
description: Javelin Battle is a spear-throwing physics puzzle game with 2D stickman models. We need you to eliminate all incoming enemies at each level in the Normal Mode. When you destroy enemy infantry's shields, they will run to you quickly. I strongly suggest you destroy the enemy spearmen on the platforms first. Don't forget to choose skills to increase your abilities and power. Keep calm and aim carefully.

title: Football Duel
description: Step into the arena in Football Duel! Take turns shooting and goalkeeping in this thrilling 3D penalty showdown. Swipe to score or defend — the first to 5 goals claims victory!

title: Colors&Forms
description:
Dynamic and exciting!
Choose the game mode!
Complete missions and pass all levels!
Levels differ in color palettes and falling elements.
Interact with the objects appearing on the game screen, which complicate the process of the game.
After accumulating enough pieces, unlock the game type “Infinity”!
Choose your favorite level and accumulate as many pieces as possible to beat your opponents!

title: Mega Fall Ragdoll Simulator
description: Mega Fall Ragdoll Simulator is a casual game where you unleash chaos by dropping a ragdoll from towering structures to maximize bone-crunching impact. Experience realistic physics as you strategize your way through intricate levels, earning coins to unlock skins and enhance your ragdoll's appearance. Brace yourself for an ultimate destruction experience like no other!

title: Build a Go-Kart
description:
Build your karting empire from scratch — from simple straights to complex tracks with boosts and risky turns.

Design unique tracks using modular blocks: combine elements, optimize your route, and find the perfect balance between speed and profit. Every ride earns money — and your track design determines how much you make.

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Solitaire Mahjong Farm 2
description: Welcome to "Solitaire Mahjong Farm 2," the sequel with more fun! Featuring Quick Play for random layouts and Chapter Division for structured progression. Complete chapters to unlock new ones, each filled with unique puzzles. A new shuffle mechanism solves tricky tile pairs, enhancing gameplay. Perfect for strategic minds seeking engaging, themed challenges. Join now and continue your Mahjong farm adventure!

title: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game
description: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game lets you become the ultimate nail artist! Step into your very own nail salon where creativity has no limits. Design stunning acrylic nails with trendy styles, vibrant colors, and charming accessories. Satisfy your customers' unique requests, earn money, and upgrade your salon to become the best nail stylist in town!

title: Steampunk Merge To Battle
description: Merge to Battle is a strategy game where the goal is to capture all the castles in your way. Unite your warriors and archers on the battlefield and fight against enemies. Build and upgrade your castle and troops. Explore the entire evolution of warriors by combining two units into an even stronger one. React quickly and use strategy and tactics to win the battle and advance to the next level.

title: Forest Glade Mysteries
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Forest Glade Mysteries — a magical forest where the cutest animals live! Each level introduces you to new fluffy friends and exciting challenges. This forest is full of mysteries, and every step brings you closer to uncovering ancient secrets!

title: Sudoku Vault
description: Sudoku Vault is a logic-based puzzle game featuring 4x4, 6x6, and 9x9 boards — each with four difficulty levels: Basic, Normal, Hard, and Expert. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, every grid offers a fresh challenge for your mind. Use smart NOTES to keep track of possibilities, and when you want to check your progress, tap the CHECK button — it will remove incorrect inputs and lock the correct ones, helping you stay focused on the solution.

title: Escape from the Portal
description:
"Your soul is trapped between worlds. The only way home is to activate an ancient portal... but only one can pass through."
Explore gloomy catacombs, avoid traps, fight monsters, uncover secrets of the past, and use magical artifacts to open the portal and escape the underworld.

title: Sudoblock Daily
description: Play this addictive combination between Sudoku and Blocks, Sudoblock! This will keep you busy for hours, test it yourself! Come back everyday for new unique challenges!

title: Horror School Detective Story
description: Ready to enter a horror school full of scares and mysteries? In Horror School: Detective Story, you’ll play the role of a brave detective. Solve the mysteries layered on top of each other at the school. Each scene is tense and exciting, full of suspense and the unknown! Choose the complexity of the scenario to start your challenge.

title: Math Box Balance
description: Math Box Balance is a puzzle game with numbers. Early levels have 2 boxes, and as you progress you can reach up to 8 boxes. Each box contains 4 number blocks, and the sum of these numbers is shown inside the box. Your goal is to make the sum of all boxes equal. You can swap number blocks between boxes to achieve the equal sum. It is an endless game where the difficulty increases over time, your score goes up, and the fun grows with it.

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.
