title: Number Collector: Brainteaser
description:
Intelligent mind-breaker logic game. Train your logic and intelligence, Improve your math skills, IQ and memory, develop your mind and compare your best records on the online leaderboard. Use your brain to connect number blocks and get a required number.
Think, count, remember, develop your mind and win!

★ Educational game.
★ For math lovers.
★ Game for kids and adults.
★ Leaderboard - compare your record in the players ranking top.
★ Colorful graphics and effects.
★ Simple control: use mouse for PC or touching/tapping on tablets and mobile phones.
★ Endless gameplay.

Make your brain smart again!

title: Student and Teacher
description:
The school is not ready for you!
Broken laptops, chairs in splinters, the dining room is looted!
Revenge is a dish served in the form of chaos!
Forget about the silent protest – only crushing anarchy!
Make your classmates regret it!
The teacher is in a panic!
The head teacher is furious!
The main thing is not to get caught and avenge the setup!

title: Going Balls 3D
description: Going Balls 3D is a relaxing 3D rolling game where smooth control and calm focus are the key to winning. Swipe to steer the wooden platform and guide the ball forward—no need to rush, just keep it steady and reach the finish line without falling.

title: Fruit Balls: Juicy Fusion
description:
Discover the exciting world of juicy fruits! The task is simple: connect identical fruits to create ever larger and tastier associations, heading towards the treasured watermelon.

- Click on the field
- Connect identical fruits
- Create combinations to get bigger fruits.
- Reach the last level
- Don't let the container overfill
- Earn money for new skins and try to pass with them ???

title: Knife Up 3D
description: Knife Up 3D is a casual game that tests your reflexes. Feel the rhythm, don't damage the ball and beat your opponents. You can unlock new skins with the rewards you get by passing the levels. It's time to test your reflexes, so if you find it interesting, don't forget to share it with your friends and join in! Have fun!

title: Online Car Destruction Simulator 3D
description: Experience a high-speed realistic car collision simulator! Drive down slopes and crash into specialized obstacles with various vehicles, all featuring authentic physics and a detailed damage system with separating parts.

title: Gin Rummy
description: "Gin Rummy" is a classic and engaging card game where the goal is to strategically arrange your hand into sets and runs. Place your cards in either groups of the same rank or in sequential order of the same suit. Score points by eliminating these combinations from your hand. The game ends when a player reaches the target score, typically set at 100 points.

title: Run 3D
description: The infinite running platformer game Run 3D takes place in the immensity of space. The character must be navigated by players through the constantly shifting space. Go, leap, and keep yourself from plummeting into the chasm!

title: Stealth Master Sneak Cat
description: Stealth Master: Sneak Cat is a fun stealth adventure game that lets you play the role of a cute cat. You will sneak through various missions! Move quietly under the close watch of enemies and surveillance equipment.

title: Cop Run 3d
description: Cop Run 3D is an arcade-style parkour game that brings you on an exciting chase adventure! In this 3D game world, you'll play as a cop, running and jumping through the city streets. Avoid obstacles, and collect various rewards! The gameplay is simple yet fun. Use your agility to jump the fence, avoid spikes, and collect coins.

title: Emoji Sort – Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Emoji Sort is a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where you match and organize cute emojis into the right tubes! Test your logic, plan your moves carefully, and enjoy hundreds of relaxing levels. Simple to play yet hard to master — perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers alike.

Play now and see if you can complete every emoji challenge!

Features: smooth animations, colorful visuals, satisfying gameplay, and brain-teasing fun made for everyone!

title: Italian Brainrot Survival Arena
description: Are you ready for the ultimate showdown between Trallero and Tung Tung Sahur? Yes, in a lava-filled cave — let’s see who will win! The player who falls into the lava the most loses the game. You can push your friend. Push your friend and make them fall into the lava. Be very careful! Avoid falling into the lava at all costs. Remember, it’s not just the danger of falling down — you also have to watch out for rocket missiles falling from the cave ceiling.

title: Purrfect Scoops
description:
Welcome to Purr-fect Scoops,
Run your own ice cream shop, serving up delightful cones and cups to a menagerie of animal customers. 
Choose from a variety of flavors.
Unlock new cups, flavors, and toppings to expand your menu and attract even more customers. 
Use power-ups like the Coin Multiplier and Tip Booster to maximize your profits and become the ultimate ice cream tycoon. 
With its charming visuals and addictive gameplay, Purr-fect Scoops is sure to delight your day.

title: Build and Run
description: Experience the ultimate blend of running and building in our action-packed game! Navigate through exciting levels by constructing missing parts of the level while running at full speed. Master using horizontal builds, slopes, and ramps to keep moving forward and avoid dangerous traps.

title: Kingdom match
description: Kingdom match is a competitive match-3 game with castle decoration options! Complete levels, compete with other players and build the best castle!

title: Romantic Match Tactics
description: Romantic Match Tactics" invites you into a charming world where love meets strategy. Immerse yourself in an enchanting puzzle adventure as you strategically clear the grid, saving moves, and mastering the key to success – a delicate balance between item movement and unlocking the locked items. Progress through 48 levels, each unveiling new challenges as you align romantic trios to triumph.

title: GTA Car Rush
description: Rev up your engines and dive into the thrilling world of GTA Car Rush, a super fun and free-to-play car chase online game perfect for kids! In this exhilarating adventure, your mission is to collect all the money scattered across each level to unlock new and exciting challenges.

title: Creepy Dress Up
description: A spooky-fun game where you unleash your creativity by dressing up in eerie costumes. Choose from a wide range of creepy outfits, ghoulish makeup, and spooky accessories. Your mission? Scare the boys and have fun watching their reactions in this fun-filled, frightfully stylish game.

title: Strange packages
description:
You wake up alone in an empty apartment where everything seems calm… until the first knock at the door. Nameless parcels, mysterious objects, eerie creatures, and meaningless incantations turn your cozy home into a nightmarish trap.

Who is sending you these items — an enemy or a savior?
Why do toys come to life, eyes grow on the walls, and a ceiling-high worm bursts from the bathtub?

title: Stick Man Battle Fighting
description: Enter the world of Stick Man Battle Fighting and every move matters! This casual fighting game lets you unleash your skills in dynamic stickman battles against enemies. Master various fighting styles and begin exciting single-mode combat. Choose a weapon and customize your hero.

title: Save Stranding Fish
description: Help all the little fish that unfortunately wash up on the beach to escape their predicament.You must pay attention to the order in which you rescue the fish.

title: Merge Drop
description: Buy and merge balls. Drop them to break the cubes. Every ball will multiply when they touch the cubes. If your balls can reach the end of the level you win.

title: Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music
description: Welcome to Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music, a game feast for 2 players filled with fun and music!Join your friends in this Halloween-inspired game to challenge the cat's music and have fun! With the rhythm of the music, control the cute cat to move. Let them eat more ice cream. You can choose a different musical challenge. You should accurately move to collect ice cream, and get the highest high score!

title: Bus Jam Escape
description: Bus Jam Escape brings addictive color-matching puzzle action straight to your browser. In this free online game, you’ll guide waiting passengers into buses by matching their colors - no download required. Ideal for fans of casual puzzle and sorting games, Bus Jam Escape delivers crisp graphics, instant play and intuitive click-and-drag controls. Jump into this vibrant web game for quick brain teasers or marathon sessions - every tap pushes you closer to a high-score win.

title: Dragon Escape
description: The cute dinosaur wants to reach the exit by eating Sandwich in the area protected by robots. If you want to help him, try to pass the levels by using laser traps without entering the robots' field of vision.

title: NSR Street Car Racing
description:
Hit the Streets & Dominate the Race! 
Jump into heart-pounding street racing action! Customize powerful cars, master drifts, unleash nitro boosts, and challenge real players in multiplayer races and intense 1v1 duels. Become a street-racing legend!

Ready, Set, Drift!

title: Bubbly Lab
description: Bubbly Lab is a physics puzzle game where you have to catch all the adorable bubbles in the laboratory. Use a super strong vacuum cleaner to get the bubbles into the flask. Use your logic to move lab items to help you get bubbles. Solve interesting puzzles in this fun and unique game!

title: Bubble Shooter Witch Tower
description: Bubble Shooter: Witch Tower is a fun, free web game that takes you into a magical world of witchcraft. Ascend the Witch Tower by bursting as many bubbles as possible in this thrilling bubble-shooting puzzle adventure. Progress through levels, rescue adorable pets, and restore the Witch Tower piece by piece. With hundreds of enchanting bubble-shooting challenges, there's always something new to conquer. Play anywhere, anytime—no time limits!

title: SNAKES
description: SNAKES is a modern puzzle game that combines strategy and spatial reasoning. Players guide multiple snakes across a grid, filling every empty tile to complete each level. With clear visuals and intuitive mechanics, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience that sharpens logical thinking. Each level introduces unique layouts and obstacles, ensuring variety and depth as players advance.

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Idle Drive: Merge, Upgrade, Drive
description: Welcome to Idle Drive: Merge Upgrade & Drive! Unleash your creativity, craft a unique vehicle for travels. Start with a basic car, enhance it using in-game currency earned by tapping. Accumulate funds for components like engines and tires. Merge parts for higher levels, boosting speed and power. Visit the garage to customize your car. Idle DriftDrive offers exhilarating fun and satisfaction of creating your own ride. Perfect for car enthusiasts and racing fans. Exciting moments await you!

title: Among Squid Challenge Online
description: All players, get ready. They are hiding in a maze. To win the game, you must defeat all the other players. You have a knife and must defeat everyone. Catch the players one by one and make sure they are eliminated. Don’t worry, they won’t find you. If they try to find you, hide in the ventilation holes. Defeat all the players. Be careful, and whatever you do, don't reveal yourself. If they catch you, you will lose and they will defeat you.

title: Army Defence Dino Shoot
description: Army Defence Dino Shoot is a third-person defense idle game. It seems that a lot of dinosaurs surround you. To protect the base from incoming dinosaurs, you can summon more soldiers and engineers to create a defensive line. Don't forget to upgrade your weapons, damage, and fire rate skills. The longer you hold this position, the more dinosaurs you will meet. Have a good time building a military base.

title: Cat Cut
description: A fun game about a hungry cat, get him a fish, cut the rope so that it falls directly to the cat. All objects move according to physics, do not miss the fish, do not upset the cat!

title: Popping Sushi
description:
Drop adorable sushi pieces into the field and watch them merge!
When two identical pieces touch, they combine into a bigger, tastier creation.
Aim for the ultimate sushi roll and claim the top spot on the global leaderboard!
